versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִי־יִתֵּן טָהוֹר מִטָּמֵא לֹא אֶחָד׃
englishText: Who can bring a clean thing out of an unclean? not one.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם חֲרוּצִים יָמָיו מִסְפַּר־חֳדָשָׁיו אִתָּךְ חקו [חֻקָּיו] עָשִׂיתָ וְלֹא יַעֲבוֹר׃
englishText: Seeing his days are determined, The number of his months is with Thee, And Thou hast appointed his bounds that he cannot pass;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שְׁעֵה מֵעָלָיו וְיֶחְדָּל עַד־יִרְצֶה כְּשָׂכִיר יוֹמוֹ׃
englishText: Look away from him, that he may rest, Till he shall accomplish, as a hireling, his day.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי יֵשׁ לָעֵץ תִּקְוָה אִם־יִכָּרֵת וְעוֹד יַחֲלִיף וְיֹנַקְתּוֹ לֹא תֶחְדָּל׃
englishText: For there is hope of a tree, If it be cut down, that it will sprout again, And that the tender branch thereof will not cease.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־יַזְקִין בָּאָרֶץ שָׁרְשׁוֹ וּבֶעָפָר יָמוּת גִּזְעוֹ׃
englishText: Though the root thereof wax old in the earth, And the stock thereof die in the ground;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מֵרֵיחַ מַיִם יַפְרִחַ וְעָשָׂה קָצִיר כְּמוֹ־נָטַע׃
englishText: Yet through the scent of water it will bud, And put forth boughs like a plant.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְגֶבֶר יָמוּת וַיֶּחֱלָשׁ וַיִּגְוַע אָדָם וְאַיּוֹ׃
englishText: But man dieth, and lieth low; Yea, man perisheth, and where is he?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָזְלוּ־מַיִם מִנִּי־יָם וְנָהָר יֶחֱרַב וְיָבֵשׁ׃
englishText: As the waters fail from the sea, And the river is drained dry;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאִישׁ שָׁכַב וְלֹא־יָקוּם עַד־בִּלְתִּי שָׁמַיִם לֹא יָקִיצוּ וְלֹא־יֵעֹרוּ מִשְּׁנָתָם׃
englishText: So man lieth down and riseth not; Till the heavens be no more, they shall not awake, Nor be roused out of their sleep.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִי יִתֵּן בִּשְׁאוֹל תַּצְפִּנֵנִי תַּסְתִּירֵנִי עַד־שׁוּב אַפֶּךָ תָּשִׁית לִי חֹק וְתִזְכְּרֵנִי׃
englishText: Oh that Thou wouldest hide me in the nether-world, That Thou wouldest keep me secret, until Thy wrath be past, That Thou wouldest appoint me a set time, and remember me!—
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־יָמוּת גֶּבֶר הֲיִחְיֶה כָּל־יְמֵי צְבָאִי אֲיַחֵל עַד־בּוֹא חֲלִיפָתִי׃
englishText: If a man die, may he live again? All the days of my service would I wait, till my relief should come—
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תִּקְרָא וְאָנֹכִי אֶעֱנֶךָּ לְמַעֲשֵׂה יָדֶיךָ תִכְסֹף׃
englishText: Thou wouldest call, and I would answer Thee; Thou wouldest have a desire to the work of Thy hands.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־עַתָּה צְעָדַי תִּסְפּוֹר לֹא־תִשְׁמוֹר עַל־חַטָּאתִי׃
englishText: But now Thou numberest my steps, Thou dost not even wait for my sin;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חָתֻם בִּצְרוֹר פִּשְׁעִי וַתִּטְפֹּל עַל־עֲוֺנִי׃
englishText: My transgression is sealed up in a bag, And Thou heapest up mine iniquity.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאוּלָם הַר־נוֹפֵל יִבּוֹל וְצוּר יֶעְתַּק מִמְּקֹמוֹ׃
englishText: And surely the mountain falling crumbleth away, And the rock is removed out of its place;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲבָנִים שָׁחֲקוּ מַיִם תִּשְׁטֹף־סְפִיחֶיהָ עֲפַר־אָרֶץ וְתִקְוַת אֱנוֹשׁ הֶאֱבַדְתָּ׃
englishText: The waters wear the stones; The overflowings thereof wash away the dust of the earth; So Thou destroyest the hope of man.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תִּתְקְפֵהוּ לָנֶצַח וַיַּהֲלֹךְ מְשַׁנֶּה פָנָיו וַתְּשַׁלְּחֵהוּ׃
englishText: Thou prevailest for ever against him, and he passeth; Thou changest his countenance, and sendest him away.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִכְבְּדוּ בָנָיו וְלֹא יֵדָע וְיִצְעֲרוּ וְלֹא־יָבִין לָמוֹ׃
englishText: His sons come to honour, and he knoweth it not; And they are brought low, but he regardeth them not.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַךְ־בְּשָׂרוֹ עָלָיו יִכְאָב וְנַפְשׁוֹ עָלָיו תֶּאֱבָל׃
englishText: But his flesh grieveth for him, And his soul mourneth over him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּעַן אֱלִיפַז הַתֵּימָנִי וַיֹּאמַר׃
englishText: Then answered Eliphaz the Temanite, and said:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֶחָכָם יַעֲנֶה דַעַת־רוּחַ וִימַלֵּא קָדִים בִּטְנוֹ׃
englishText: Should a wise man make answer with windy knowledge, And fill his belly with the east wind?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הוֹכֵחַ בְּדָבָר לֹא יִסְכּוֹן וּמִלִּים לֹא־יוֹעִיל בָּם׃
englishText: Should he reason with unprofitable talk, Or with speeches wherewith he can do no good?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַף־אַתָּה תָּפֵר יִרְאָה וְתִגְרַע שִׂיחָה לִפְנֵי־אֵל׃
englishText: Yea, thou doest away with fear, And impairest devotion before God.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי יְאַלֵּף עֲוֺנְךָ פִיךָ וְתִבְחַר לְשׁוֹן עֲרוּמִים׃
englishText: For thine iniquity teacheth thy mouth, And thou choosest the tongue of the crafty.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יַרְשִׁיעֲךָ פִיךָ וְלֹא־אָנִי וּשְׂפָתֶיךָ יַעֲנוּ־בָךְ׃
englishText: Thine own mouth condemneth thee, and not I; Yea, thine own lips testify against thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲרִאישׁוֹן אָדָם תִּוָּלֵד וְלִפְנֵי גְבָעוֹת חוֹלָלְתָּ׃
englishText: Art thou the first man that was born? Or wast thou brought forth before the hills?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַבְסוֹד אֱלוֹהַ תִּשְׁמָע וְתִגְרַע אֵלֶיךָ חָכְמָה׃
englishText: Dost thou hearken in the council of God? And dost thou restrain wisdom to thyself?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַה־יָּדַעְתָּ וְלֹא נֵדָע תָּבִין וְלֹא־עִמָּנוּ הוּא׃
englishText: What knowest thou, that we know not? What understandest thou, which is not in us?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גַּם־שָׂב גַּם־יָשִׁישׁ בָּנוּ כַּבִּיר מֵאָבִיךָ יָמִים׃
englishText: With us are both the gray-headed and the very aged men, Much older than thy father.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַמְעַט מִמְּךָ תַּנְחֻמוֹת אֵל וְדָבָר לָאַט עִמָּךְ׃
englishText: Are the consolations of God too small for thee, And the word that dealeth gently with thee?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַה־יִּקָּחֲךָ לִבֶּךָ וּמַה־יִּרְזְמוּן עֵינֶיךָ׃
englishText: Why doth thy heart carry thee away? And why do thine eyes wink?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־תָשִׁיב אֶל־אֵל רוּחֶךָ וְהֹצֵאתָ מִפִּיךָ מִלִּין׃
englishText: That thou turnest thy spirit against God, And lettest such words go out of thy mouth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מָה־אֱנוֹשׁ כִּי־יִזְכֶּה וְכִי־יִצְדַּק יְלוּד אִשָּׁה׃
englishText: What is man, that he should be clean? And he that is born of a woman, that he should be righteous?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֵן בקדשו [בִּקְדֹשָׁיו] לֹא יַאֲמִין וְשָׁמַיִם לֹא־זַכּוּ בְעֵינָיו׃
englishText: Behold, He putteth no trust in His holy ones; Yea, the heavens are not clean in His sight.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַף כִּי־נִתְעָב וְנֶאֱלָח אִישׁ־שֹׁתֶה כַמַּיִם עַוְלָה׃
englishText: How much less one that is abominable and impure, Man who drinketh iniquity like water! .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲחַוְךָ שְׁמַע־לִי וְזֶה־חָזִיתִי וַאֲסַפֵּרָה׃
englishText: I will tell thee, hear thou me; And that which I have seen I will declare—
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲשֶׁר־חֲכָמִים יַגִּידוּ וְלֹא כִחֲדוּ מֵאֲבוֹתָם׃
englishText: Which wise men have told From their fathers, and have not hid it;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לָהֶם לְבַדָּם נִתְּנָה הָאָרֶץ וְלֹא־עָבַר זָר בְּתוֹכָם׃
englishText: Unto whom alone the land was given, And no stranger passed among them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כָּל־יְמֵי רָשָׁע הוּא מִתְחוֹלֵל וּמִסְפַּר שָׁנִים נִצְפְּנוּ לֶעָרִיץ׃
englishText: The wicked man travaileth with pain all his days, Even the number of years that are laid up for the oppressor.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קוֹל־פְּחָדִים בְּאָזְנָיו בַּשָּׁלוֹם שׁוֹדֵד יְבוֹאֶנּוּ׃
englishText: A sound of terrors is in his ears: In prosperity the destroyer shall come upon him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־יַאֲמִין שׁוּב מִנִּי־חֹשֶׁךְ וצפו [וְצָפוּי] הוּא אֱלֵי־חָרֶב׃
englishText: He believeth not that he shall return out of darkness, And he is waited for of the sword.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נֹדֵד הוּא לַלֶּחֶם אַיֵּה יָדַע כִּי־נָכוֹן בְּיָדוֹ יוֹם־חֹשֶׁךְ׃
englishText: He wandereth abroad for bread: ‘Where is it?’ He knoweth that the day of darkness is ready at his hand.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְבַעֲתֻהוּ צַר וּמְצוּקָה תִּתְקְפֵהוּ כְּמֶלֶךְ עָתִיד לַכִּידוֹר׃
englishText: Distress and anguish overwhelm him; They prevail against him, as a king ready to the battle.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־נָטָה אֶל־אֵל יָדוֹ וְאֶל־שַׁדַּי יִתְגַּבָּר׃
englishText: Because he hath stretched out his hand against God, And behaveth himself proudly against the Almighty;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָרוּץ אֵלָיו בְּצַוָּאר בַּעֲבִי גַּבֵּי מָגִנָּיו׃
englishText: He runneth upon him with a stiff neck, With the thick bosses of his bucklers.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־כִסָּה פָנָיו בְּחֶלְבּוֹ וַיַּעַשׂ פִּימָה עֲלֵי־כָסֶל׃
englishText: Because he hath covered his face with his fatness, And made collops of fat on his loins;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּשְׁכּוֹן עָרִים נִכְחָדוֹת בָּתִּים לֹא־יֵשְׁבוּ לָמוֹ אֲשֶׁר הִתְעַתְּדוּ לְגַלִּים׃
englishText: And he hath dwelt in desolate cities, In houses which no man would inhabit, Which were ready to become heaps.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־יֶעְשַׁר וְלֹא־יָקוּם חֵילוֹ וְלֹא־יִטֶּה לָאָרֶץ מִנְלָם׃
englishText: He shall not be rich, neither shall his substance continue, Neither shall their produce bend to the earth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־יָסוּר מִנִּי־חֹשֶׁךְ יֹנַקְתּוֹ תְּיַבֵּשׁ שַׁלְהָבֶת וְיָסוּר בְּרוּחַ פִּיו׃
englishText: He shall not depart out of darkness; The flame shall dry up his branches, And by the breath of His mouth shall he go away.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־יַאֲמֵן בשו [בַּשָּׁיו] נִתְעָה כִּי־שָׁוְא תִּהְיֶה תְמוּרָתוֹ׃
englishText: Let him not trust in vanity, deceiving himself; For vanity shall be his recompense.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּלֹא־יוֹמוֹ תִּמָּלֵא וְכִפָּתוֹ לֹא רַעֲנָנָה׃
englishText: It shall be accomplished before his time, And his branch shall not be leafy.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יַחְמֹס כַּגֶּפֶן בִּסְרוֹ וְיַשְׁלֵךְ כַּזַּיִת נִצָּתוֹ׃
englishText: He shall shake off his unripe grape as the vine, And shall cast off his flower as the olive.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־עֲדַת חָנֵף גַּלְמוּד וְאֵשׁ אָכְלָה אָהֳלֵי־שֹׁחַד׃
englishText: For the company of the godless shall be desolate, And fire shall consume the tents of bribery.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הָרֹה עָמָל וְיָלֹד אָוֶן וּבִטְנָם תָּכִין מִרְמָה׃
englishText: They conceive mischief, and bring forth iniquity, And their belly prepareth deceit.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּעַן אִיּוֹב וַיֹּאמַר׃
englishText: Then Job answered and said:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׁמַעְתִּי כְאֵלֶּה רַבּוֹת מְנַחֲמֵי עָמָל כֻּלְּכֶם׃
englishText: I have heard many such things; Sorry comforters are ye all.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲקֵץ לְדִבְרֵי־רוּחַ אוֹ מַה־יַּמְרִיצְךָ כִּי תַעֲנֶה׃
englishText: Shall windy words have an end? Or what provoketh thee that thou answerest?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גַּם אָנֹכִי כָּכֶם אֲדַבֵּרָה לוּ־יֵשׁ נַפְשְׁכֶם תַּחַת נַפְשִׁי אַחְבִּירָה עֲלֵיכֶם בְּמִלִּים וְאָנִיעָה עֲלֵיכֶם בְּמוֹ רֹאשִׁי׃
englishText: I also could speak as ye do; If your soul were in my soul’s stead, I could join words together against you, And shake my head at you.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲאַמִּצְכֶם בְּמוֹ־פִי וְנִיד שְׂפָתַי יַחְשֹׂךְ׃
englishText: I would strengthen you with my mouth, And the moving of my lips would assuage your grief.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־אֲדַבְּרָה לֹא־יֵחָשֵׂךְ כְּאֵבִי וְאַחְדְּלָה מַה־מִנִּי יַהֲלֹךְ׃
englishText: Though I speak, my pain is not assuaged; And though I forbear, what am I eased?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַךְ־עַתָּה הֶלְאָנִי הֲשִׁמּוֹתָ כָּל־עֲדָתִי׃
englishText: But now He hath made me weary; Thou hast made desolate all my company.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַתִּקְמְטֵנִי לְעֵד הָיָה וַיָּקָם בִּי כַחֲשִׁי בְּפָנַי יַעֲנֶה׃
englishText: And Thou hast shrivelled me up, which is a witness against me; And my leanness riseth up against me, it testifieth to my face.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַפּוֹ טָרַף וַיִּשְׂטְמֵנִי חָרַק עָלַי בְּשִׁנָּיו צָרִי יִלְטוֹשׁ עֵינָיו לִי׃
englishText: He hath torn me in His wrath, and hated me; He hath gnashed upon me with His teeth; Mine adversary sharpeneth his eyes upon me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פָּעֲרוּ עָלַי בְּפִיהֶם בְּחֶרְפָּה הִכּוּ לְחָיָי יַחַד עָלַי יִתְמַלָּאוּן׃
englishText: They have gaped upon me with their mouth; They have smitten me upon the cheek scornfully; They gather themselves together against me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יַסְגִּירֵנִי אֵל אֶל עֲוִיל וְעַל־יְדֵי רְשָׁעִים יִרְטֵנִי׃
englishText: God delivereth me to the ungodly, And casteth me into the hands of the wicked.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׁלֵו הָיִיתִי וַיְפַרְפְּרֵנִי וְאָחַז בְּעָרְפִּי וַיְפַצְפְּצֵנִי וַיְקִימֵנִי לוֹ לְמַטָּרָה׃
englishText: I was at ease, and He broke me asunder; Yea, He hath taken me by the neck, and dashed me to pieces; He hath also set me up for His mark.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָסֹבּוּ עָלַי רַבָּיו יְפַלַּח כִּלְיוֹתַי וְלֹא יַחְמוֹל יִשְׁפֹּךְ לָאָרֶץ מְרֵרָתִי׃
englishText: His archers compass me round about, He cleaveth my reins asunder, and doth not spare; He poureth out my gall upon the ground.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִפְרְצֵנִי פֶרֶץ עַל־פְּנֵי־פָרֶץ יָרֻץ עָלַי כְּגִבּוֹר׃
englishText: He breaketh me with breach upon breach; He runneth upon me like a giant.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שַׂק תָּפַרְתִּי עֲלֵי גִלְדִּי וְעֹלַלְתִּי בֶעָפָר קַרְנִי׃
englishText: I have sewed sackcloth upon my skin, And have laid my horn in the dust.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פָּנַי חמרמרה [חֳמַרְמְרוּ] מִנִּי־בֶכִי וְעַל עַפְעַפַּי צַלְמָוֶת׃
englishText: My face is reddened with weeping, And on my eyelids is the shadow of death;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַל לֹא־חָמָס בְּכַפָּי וּתְפִלָּתִי זַכָּה׃
englishText: Although there is no violence in my hands, And my prayer is pure.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֶרֶץ אַל־תְּכַסִּי דָמִי וְאַל־יְהִי מָקוֹם לְזַעֲקָתִי׃
englishText: O earth, cover not thou my blood, And let my cry have no resting-place.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גַּם־עַתָּה הִנֵּה־בַשָּׁמַיִם עֵדִי וְשָׂהֲדִי בַּמְּרוֹמִים׃
englishText: Even now, behold, my Witness is in heaven, And He that testifieth of me is on high.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מְלִיצַי רֵעָי אֶל־אֱלוֹהַ דָּלְפָה עֵינִי׃
englishText: Mine inward thoughts are my intercessors, Mine eye poureth out tears unto God;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְיוֹכַח לְגֶבֶר עִם־אֱלוֹהַּ וּבֶן־אָדָם לְרֵעֵהוּ׃
englishText: That He would set aright a man contending with God, As a son of man setteth aright his neighbour! .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־שְׁנוֹת מִסְפָּר יֶאֱתָיוּ וְאֹרַח לֹא־אָשׁוּב אֶהֱלֹךְ׃
englishText: For the years that are few are coming on, And I shall go the way whence I shall not return.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רוּחִי חֻבָּלָה יָמַי נִזְעָכוּ קְבָרִים לִי׃
englishText: My spirit consumed, my days are extinct, The grave is ready for me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־לֹא הֲתֻלִים עִמָּדִי וּבְהַמְּרוֹתָם תָּלַן עֵינִי׃
englishText: Surely there are mockers with me, And mine eye abideth in their provocation.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׂימָה־נָּא עָרְבֵנִי עִמָּךְ מִי הוּא לְיָדִי יִתָּקֵעַ׃
englishText: Give now a pledge, be surety for me with Thyself; Who else is there that will strike hands with me?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־לִבָּם צָפַנְתָּ מִּשָּׂכֶל עַל־כֵּן לֹא תְרֹמֵם׃
englishText: For Thou hast hid their heart from understanding; Therefore shalt Thou not exalt them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְחֵלֶק יַגִּיד רֵעִים וְעֵינֵי בָנָיו תִּכְלֶנָה׃
englishText: He that denounceth his friends for the sake of flattery, Even the eyes of his children shall fail.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְהִצִּגַנִי לִמְשֹׁל עַמִּים וְתֹפֶת לְפָנִים אֶהְיֶה׃
englishText: He hath made me also a byword of the people; And I am become one in whose face they spit.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַתֵּכַהּ מִכַּעַשׂ עֵינִי וִיצֻרַי כַּצֵּל כֻּלָּם׃
englishText: Mine eye also is dimmed by reason of vexation, And all my members are as a shadow.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָשֹׁמּוּ יְשָׁרִים עַל־זֹאת וְנָקִי עַל־חָנֵף יִתְעֹרָר׃
englishText: Upright men are astonished at this, And the innocent stirreth up himself against the godless.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְיֹאחֵז צַדִּיק דַּרְכּוֹ וּטֳהָר־יָדַיִם יֹסִיף אֹמֶץ׃
englishText: Yet the righteous holdeth on his way, And he that hath clean hands waxeth stronger and stronger.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאוּלָם כֻּלָּם תָּשֻׁבוּ וּבֹאוּ נָא וְלֹא־אֶמְצָא בָכֶם חָכָם׃
englishText: But as for you all, do ye return, and come now; And I shall not find a wise man among you.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָמַי עָבְרוּ זִמֹּתַי נִתְּקוּ מוֹרָשֵׁי לְבָבִי׃
englishText: My days are past, my purposes are broken off, Even the thoughts of my heart.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַיְלָה לְיוֹם יָשִׂימוּ אוֹר קָרוֹב מִפְּנֵי־חֹשֶׁךְ׃
englishText: They change the night into day; The light is short because of darkness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־אֲקַוֶּה שְׁאוֹל בֵּיתִי בַּחֹשֶׁךְ רִפַּדְתִּי יְצוּעָי׃
englishText: If I look for the nether-world as my house; If I have spread my couch in the darkness;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַשַּׁחַת קָרָאתִי אָבִי אָתָּה אִמִּי וַאֲחֹתִי לָרִמָּה׃
englishText: If I have said to corruption: ‘Thou art my father’, To the worm: ‘Thou art my mother, and my sister’;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאַיֵּה אֵפוֹ תִקְוָתִי וְתִקְוָתִי מִי יְשׁוּרֶנָּה׃
englishText: Where then is my hope? And as for my hope, who shall see it?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בַּדֵּי שְׁאֹל תֵּרַדְנָה אִם־יַחַד עַל־עָפָר נָחַת׃
englishText: They shall go down to the bars of the nether-world, When we are at rest together in the dust.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּעַן בִּלְדַּד הַשֻּׁחִי וַיֹּאמַר׃
englishText: Then answered Bildad the Shuhite, and said:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַד־אָנָה תְּשִׂימוּן קִנְצֵי לְמִלִּין תָּבִינוּ וְאַחַר נְדַבֵּר׃
englishText: How long will ye lay snares for words? Consider, and afterwards we will speak.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַדּוּעַ נֶחְשַׁבְנוּ כַבְּהֵמָה נִטְמִינוּ בְּעֵינֵיכֶם׃
englishText: Wherefore are we counted as beasts, And reputed dull in your sight?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: טֹרֵף נַפְשׁוֹ בְּאַפּוֹ הַלְמַעַנְךָ תֵּעָזַב אָרֶץ וְיֶעְתַּק־צוּר מִמְּקֹמוֹ׃
englishText: Thou that tearest thyself in thine anger, Shall the earth be forsaken for thee? Or shall the rock be removed out of its place? .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גַּם אוֹר רְשָׁעִים יִדְעָךְ וְלֹא־יִגַּהּ שְׁבִיב אִשּׁוֹ׃
englishText: Yea, the light of the wicked shall be put out, And the spark of his fire shall not shine.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אוֹר חָשַׁךְ בְּאָהֳלוֹ וְנֵרוֹ עָלָיו יִדְעָךְ׃
englishText: The light shall be dark in his tent, And his lamp over him shall be put out.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יֵצְרוּ צַעֲדֵי אוֹנוֹ וְתַשְׁלִיכֵהוּ עֲצָתוֹ׃
englishText: The steps of his strength shall be straitened, And his own counsel shall cast him down.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־שֻׁלַּח בְּרֶשֶׁת בְּרַגְלָיו וְעַל־שְׂבָכָה יִתְהַלָּךְ׃
englishText: For he is cast into a net by his own feet, And he walketh upon the toils.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יֹאחֵז בְּעָקֵב פָּח יַחֲזֵק עָלָיו צַמִּים׃
englishText: A gin shall take him by the heel, And a snare shall lay hold on him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: טָמוּן בָּאָרֶץ חַבְלוֹ וּמַלְכֻּדְתּוֹ עֲלֵי נָתִיב׃
englishText: A noose is hid for him in the ground, And a trap for him in the way.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: סָבִיב בִּעֲתֻהוּ בַלָּהוֹת וֶהֱפִיצֻהוּ לְרַגְלָיו׃
englishText: Terrors shall overwhelm him on every side, And shall entrap him at his feet.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהִי־רָעֵב אֹנוֹ וְאֵיד נָכוֹן לְצַלְעוֹ׃
englishText: His trouble shall be ravenous, And calamity shall be ready for his fall.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יֹאכַל בַּדֵּי עוֹרוֹ יֹאכַל בַּדָּיו בְּכוֹר מָוֶת׃
englishText: It shall devour the members of his body, Yea, the first-born of death shall devour his members.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִנָּתֵק מֵאָהֳלוֹ מִבְטַחוֹ וְתַצְעִדֵהוּ לְמֶלֶךְ בַּלָּהוֹת׃
englishText: That wherein he trusteth shall be plucked out of his tent; And he shall be brought to the king of terrors.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תִּשְׁכּוֹן בְּאָהֳלוֹ מִבְּלִי־לוֹ יְזֹרֶה עַל־נָוֵהוּ גָפְרִית׃
englishText: There shall dwell in his tent that which is none of his; Brimstone shall be scattered upon his habitation.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִתַּחַת שָׁרָשָׁיו יִבָשׁוּ וּמִמַּעַל יִמַּל קְצִירוֹ׃
englishText: His roots shall dry up beneath, And above shall his branch wither.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זִכְרוֹ־אָבַד מִנִּי־אָרֶץ וְלֹא־שֵׁם לוֹ עַל־פְּנֵי־חוּץ׃
englishText: His remembrance shall perish from the earth, And he shall have no name abroad.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יֶהְדְּפֻהוּ מֵאוֹר אֶל־חֹשֶׁךְ וּמִתֵּבֵל יְנִדֻּהוּ׃
englishText: He shall be driven from light into darkness, And chased out of the world.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא נִין לוֹ וְלֹא־נֶכֶד בְּעַמּוֹ וְאֵין שָׂרִיד בִּמְגוּרָיו׃
englishText: He shall have neither son nor son’s son among his people, Nor any remaining in his dwellings.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַל־יוֹמוֹ נָשַׁמּוּ אַחֲרֹנִים וְקַדְמֹנִים אָחֲזוּ שָׂעַר׃
englishText: They that come after shall be astonished at his day, As they that went before are affrighted.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַךְ־אֵלֶּה מִשְׁכְּנוֹת עַוָּל וְזֶה מְקוֹם לֹא־יָדַע־אֵל׃
englishText: Surely such are the dwellings of the wicked, And this is the place of him that knoweth not God.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּעַן אִיּוֹב וַיֹּאמַר׃
englishText: Then Job answered and said:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַד־אָנָה תּוֹגְיוּן נַפְשִׁי וּתְדַכְּאוּנַנִי בְמִלִּים׃
englishText: How long will ye vex my soul, And crush me with words?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זֶה עֶשֶׂר פְּעָמִים תַּכְלִימוּנִי לֹא־תֵבֹשׁוּ תַּהְכְּרוּ־לִי׃
englishText: These ten times have ye reproached me; Ye are not ashamed that ye deal harshly with me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאַף־אָמְנָם שָׁגִיתִי אִתִּי תָּלִין מְשׁוּגָתִי׃
englishText: And be it indeed that I have erred, Mine error remaineth with myself.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־אָמְנָם עָלַי תַּגְדִּילוּ וְתוֹכִיחוּ עָלַי חֶרְפָּתִּי׃
englishText: If indeed ye will magnify yourselves against me, And plead against me my reproach;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: דְּעוּ־אֵפוֹ כִּי־אֱלוֹהַּ עִוְּתָנִי וּמְצוּדוֹ עָלַי הִקִּיף׃
englishText: Know now that God hath subverted my cause, And hath compassed me with His net.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֵן אֶצְעַק חָמָס וְלֹא אֵעָנֶה אֲשַׁוַּע וְאֵין מִשְׁפָּט׃
englishText: Behold, I cry out: ‘Violence! ’ but I am not heard; I cry aloud, but there is no justice. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָרְחִי גָדַר וְלֹא אֶעֱבוֹר וְעַל נְתִיבוֹתַי חֹשֶׁךְ יָשִׂים׃
englishText: He hath fenced up my way that I cannot pass, And hath set darkness in my paths.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כְּבוֹדִי מֵעָלַי הִפְשִׁיט וַיָּסַר עֲטֶרֶת רֹאשִׁי׃
englishText: He hath stripped me of my glory, And taken the crown from my head.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִתְּצֵנִי סָבִיב וָאֵלַךְ וַיַּסַּע כָּעֵץ תִּקְוָתִי׃
englishText: He hath broken me down on every side, and I am gone; And my hope hath He plucked up like a tree.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּחַר עָלַי אַפּוֹ וַיַּחְשְׁבֵנִי לוֹ כְצָרָיו׃
englishText: He hath also kindled His wrath against me, And He counteth me unto Him as one of His adversaries.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יַחַד יָבֹאוּ גְדוּדָיו וַיָּסֹלּוּ עָלַי דַּרְכָּם וַיַּחֲנוּ סָבִיב לְאָהֳלִי׃
englishText: His troops come on together, And cast up their way against me, And encamp round about my tent.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַחַי מֵעָלַי הִרְחִיק וְיֹדְעַי אַךְ־זָרוּ מִמֶּנִּי׃
englishText: He hath put my brethren far from me, And mine acquaintance are wholly estranged from me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חָדְלוּ קְרוֹבָי וּמְיֻדָּעַי שְׁכֵחוּנִי׃
englishText: My kinsfolk have failed, And my familiar friends have forgotten me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גָּרֵי בֵיתִי וְאַמְהֹתַי לְזָר תַּחְשְׁבֻנִי נָכְרִי הָיִיתִי בְעֵינֵיהֶם׃
englishText: They that dwell in my house, and my maids, count me for a stranger; I am become an alien in their sight.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְעַבְדִּי קָרָאתִי וְלֹא יַעֲנֶה בְּמוֹ־פִי אֶתְחַנֶּן־לוֹ׃
englishText: I call unto my servant, and he giveth me no answer, Though I entreat him with my mouth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רוּחִי זָרָה לְאִשְׁתִּי וְחַנֹּתִי לִבְנֵי בִטְנִי׃
englishText: My breath is abhorred of my wife, And I am loathsome to the children of my tribe.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גַּם־עֲוִילִים מָאֲסוּ בִי אָקוּמָה וַיְדַבְּרוּ־בִי׃
englishText: Even urchins despised me; If I arise, they speak against me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תִּעֲבוּנִי כָּל־מְתֵי סוֹדִי וְזֶה־אָהַבְתִּי נֶהְפְּכוּ־בִי׃
englishText: All my intimate friends abhor me; And they whom I loved are turned against me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּעוֹרִי וּבִבְשָׂרִי דָּבְקָה עַצְמִי וָאֶתְמַלְּטָה בְּעוֹר שִׁנָּי׃
englishText: My bone cleaveth to my skin and to my flesh, And I am escaped with the skin of my teeth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חָנֻּנִי חָנֻּנִי אַתֶּם רֵעָי כִּי יַד־אֱלוֹהַּ נָגְעָה בִּי׃
englishText: Have pity upon me, have pity upon me, O ye my friends; For the hand of God hath touched me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לָמָּה תִּרְדְּפֻנִי כְמוֹ־אֵל וּמִבְּשָׂרִי לֹא תִשְׂבָּעוּ׃
englishText: Why do ye persecute me as God, And are not satisfied with my flesh?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִי־יִתֵּן אֵפוֹ וְיִכָּתְבוּן מִלָּי מִי־יִתֵּן בַּסֵּפֶר וְיֻחָקוּ׃
englishText: Oh that my words were now written! Oh that they were inscribed in a book!
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּעֵט־בַּרְזֶל וְעֹפָרֶת לָעַד בַּצּוּר יֵחָצְבוּן׃
englishText: That with an iron pen and lead They were graven in the rock for ever!
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַאֲנִי יָדַעְתִּי גֹּאֲלִי חָי וְאַחֲרוֹן עַל־עָפָר יָקוּם׃
englishText: But as for me, I know that my Redeemer liveth, And that He will witness at the last upon the dust;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאַחַר עוֹרִי נִקְּפוּ־זֹאת וּמִבְּשָׂרִי אֶחֱזֶה אֱלוֹהַּ׃
englishText: And when after my skin this is destroyed, Then without my flesh shall I see God;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲשֶׁר אֲנִי אֶחֱזֶה־לִּי וְעֵינַי רָאוּ וְלֹא־זָר כָּלוּ כִלְיֹתַי בְּחֵקִי׃
englishText: Whom I, even I, shall see for myself, And mine eyes shall behold, and not another’s. My reins are consumed within me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי תֹאמְרוּ מַה־נִּרְדָּף־לוֹ וְשֹׁרֶשׁ דָּבָר נִמְצָא־בִי׃
englishText: If ye say: ‘How we will persecute him! ’ Seeing that the root of the matter is found in me;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גּוּרוּ לָכֶם מִפְּנֵי־חֶרֶב כִּי־חֵמָה עֲוֺנוֹת חָרֶב לְמַעַן תֵּדְעוּן שדין [שַׁדּוּן׃]
englishText: Be ye afraid of the sword; For wrath bringeth the punishments of the sword, That ye may know there is a judgment.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּעַן צֹפַר הַנַּעֲמָתִי וַיֹּאמַר׃
englishText: Then answered Zophar the Naamathite, and said:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לָכֵן שְׂעִפַּי יְשִׁיבוּנִי וּבַעֲבוּר חוּשִׁי בִי׃
englishText: Therefore do my thoughts give answer to me, Even by reason of mine agitation that is in me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מוּסַר כְּלִמָּתִי אֶשְׁמָע וְרוּחַ מִבִּינָתִי יַעֲנֵנִי׃
englishText: I have heard the reproof which putteth me to shame, But out of my understanding my spirit answereth me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲזֹאת יָדַעְתָּ מִנִּי־עַד מִנִּי שִׂים אָדָם עֲלֵי־אָרֶץ׃
englishText: Knowest thou not this of old time, Since man was placed upon earth,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי רִנְנַת רְשָׁעִים מִקָּרוֹב וְשִׂמְחַת חָנֵף עֲדֵי־רָגַע׃
englishText: That the triumphing of the wicked is short, And the joy of the godless but for a moment?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־יַעֲלֶה לַשָּׁמַיִם שִׂיאוֹ וְרֹאשׁוֹ לָעָב יַגִּיעַ׃
englishText: Though his excellency mount up to the heavens, And his head reach unto the clouds;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כְּגֶלֲלוֹ לָנֶצַח יֹאבֵד רֹאָיו יֹאמְרוּ אַיּוֹ׃
englishText: Yet he shall perish for ever like his own dung; They that have seen him shall say: ‘Where is he?’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כַּחֲלוֹם יָעוּף וְלֹא יִמְצָאוּהוּ וְיֻדַּד כְּחֶזְיוֹן לָיְלָה׃
englishText: He shall fly away as a dream, and shall not be found; Yea, he shall be chased away as a vision of the night.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַיִן שְׁזָפַתּוּ וְלֹא תוֹסִיף וְלֹא־עוֹד תְּשׁוּרֶנּוּ מְקוֹמוֹ׃
englishText: The eye which saw him shall see him no more; Neither shall his place any more behold him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בָּנָיו יְרַצּוּ דַלִּים וְיָדָיו תָּשֵׁבְנָה אוֹנוֹ׃
englishText: His children shall appease the poor, And his hands shall restore his wealth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַצְמוֹתָיו מָלְאוּ עלומו [עֲלוּמָיו] וְעִמּוֹ עַל־עָפָר תִּשְׁכָּב׃
englishText: His bones are full of his youth, But it shall lie down with him in the dust.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־תַּמְתִּיק בְּפִיו רָעָה יַכְחִידֶנָּה תַּחַת לְשׁוֹנוֹ׃
englishText: Though wickedness be sweet in his mouth, Though he hide it under his tongue;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יַחְמֹל עָלֶיהָ וְלֹא יַעַזְבֶנָּה וְיִמְנָעֶנָּה בְּתוֹךְ חִכּוֹ׃
englishText: Though he spare it, and will not let it go, But keep it still within his mouth;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַחְמוֹ בְּמֵעָיו נֶהְפָּךְ מְרוֹרַת פְּתָנִים בְּקִרְבּוֹ׃
englishText: Yet his food in his bowels is turned, It is the gall of asps within him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חַיִל בָּלַע וַיְקִאֶנּוּ מִבִּטְנוֹ יוֹרִשֶׁנּוּ אֵל׃
englishText: He hath swallowed down riches, and he shall vomit them up again; God shall cast them out of his belly.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רֹאשׁ־פְּתָנִים יִינָק תַּהַרְגֵהוּ לְשׁוֹן אֶפְעֶה׃
englishText: He shall suck the poison of asps; The viper’s tongue shall slay him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־יֵרֶא בִפְלַגּוֹת נַהֲרֵי נַחֲלֵי דְּבַשׁ וְחֶמְאָה׃
englishText: He shall not look upon the rivers, The flowing streams of honey and curd.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מֵשִׁיב יָגָע וְלֹא יִבְלָע כְּחֵיל תְּמוּרָתוֹ וְלֹא יַעֲלֹס׃
englishText: That which he laboured for shall he give back, and shall not swallow it down; According to the substance that he hath gotten, he shall not rejoice.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־רִצַּץ עָזַב דַּלִּים בַּיִת גָּזַל וְלֹא יִבֶנֵהוּ׃
englishText: For he hath oppressed and forsaken the poor; He hath violently taken away a house, and he shall not build it up.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי לֹא־יָדַע שָׁלֵו בְּבִטְנוֹ בַּחֲמוּדוֹ לֹא יְמַלֵּט׃
englishText: Because he knew no quietness within him, In his greed he suffered nought to escape,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֵין־שָׂרִיד לְאָכְלוֹ עַל־כֵּן לֹא־יָחִיל טוּבוֹ׃
englishText: There was nothing left that he devoured not— Therefore his prosperity shall not endure. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בִּמְלֹאות שִׂפְקוֹ יֵצֶר לוֹ כָּל־יַד עָמֵל תְּבוֹאֶנּוּ׃
englishText: In the fulness of his sufficiency he shall be in straits; The hand of every one that is in misery shall come upon him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהִי לְמַלֵּא בִטְנוֹ יְשַׁלַּח־בּוֹ חֲרוֹן אַפּוֹ וְיַמְטֵר עָלֵימוֹ בִּלְחוּמוֹ׃
englishText: It shall be for the filling of his belly; He shall cast the fierceness of His wrath upon him, And shall cause it to rain upon him into his flesh.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִבְרַח מִנֵּשֶׁק בַּרְזֶל תַּחְלְפֵהוּ קֶשֶׁת נְחוּשָׁה׃
englishText: If he flee from the iron weapon, The bow of brass shall strike him through.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׁלַף וַיֵּצֵא מִגֵּוָה וּבָרָק מִמְּרֹרָתוֹ יַהֲלֹךְ עָלָיו אֵמִים׃
englishText: He draweth it forth, and it cometh out of his body; Yea, the glittering point cometh out of his gall; Terrors are upon him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כָּל־חֹשֶׁךְ טָמוּן לִצְפּוּנָיו תְּאָכְלֵהוּ אֵשׁ לֹא־נֻפָּח יֵרַע שָׂרִיד בְּאָהֳלוֹ׃
englishText: All darkness is laid up for his treasures; A fire not blown by man shall consume him; It shall go ill with him that is left in his tent.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְגַלּוּ שָׁמַיִם עֲוֺנוֹ וְאֶרֶץ מִתְקוֹמָמָה לוֹ׃
englishText: The heavens shall reveal his iniquity, And the earth shall rise up against him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִגֶל יְבוּל בֵּיתוֹ נִגָּרוֹת בְּיוֹם אַפּוֹ׃
englishText: The increase of his house shall depart, His goods shall flow away in the day of his wrath.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זֶה חֵלֶק־אָדָם רָשָׁע מֵאֱלֹהִים וְנַחֲלַת אִמְרוֹ מֵאֵל׃
englishText: This is the portion of a wicked man from God, And the heritage appointed unto him by God.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּעַן אִיּוֹב וַיֹּאמַר׃
englishText: Then Job answered and said:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׁמְעוּ שָׁמוֹעַ מִלָּתִי וּתְהִי־זֹאת תַּנְחוּמֹתֵיכֶם׃
englishText: Hear diligently my speech; And let this be your consolations.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׂאוּנִי וְאָנֹכִי אֲדַבֵּר וְאַחַר דַּבְּרִי תַלְעִיג׃
englishText: Suffer me, that I may speak; And after that I have spoken, mock on.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֶאָנֹכִי לְאָדָם שִׂיחִי וְאִם־מַדּוּעַ לֹא־תִקְצַר רוּחִי׃
englishText: As for me, is my complaint to man? Or why should I not be impatient?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פְּנוּ־אֵלַי וְהָשַׁמּוּ וְשִׂימוּ יָד עַל־פֶּה׃
englishText: Turn unto me, and be astonished, And lay your hand upon your mouth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאִם־זָכַרְתִּי וְנִבְהָלְתִּי וְאָחַז בְּשָׂרִי פַּלָּצוּת׃
englishText: Even when I remember I am affrighted, And horror hath taketh hold on my flesh.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַדּוּעַ רְשָׁעִים יִחְיוּ עָתְקוּ גַּם־גָּבְרוּ חָיִל׃
englishText: Wherefore do the wicked live, Become old, yea, wax mighty in power?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זַרְעָם נָכוֹן לִפְנֵיהֶם עִמָּם וְצֶאֱצָאֵיהֶם לְעֵינֵיהֶם׃
englishText: Their seed is established in their sight with them, And their offspring before their eyes.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בָּתֵּיהֶם שָׁלוֹם מִפָּחַד וְלֹא שֵׁבֶט אֱלוֹהַּ עֲלֵיהֶם׃
englishText: Their houses are safe, without fear, Neither is the rod of God upon them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שׁוֹרוֹ עִבַּר וְלֹא יַגְעִל תְּפַלֵּט פָּרָתוֹ וְלֹא תְשַׁכֵּל׃
englishText: Their bull gendereth, and faileth not; Their cow calveth, and casteth not her calf.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְשַׁלְּחוּ כַצֹּאן עֲוִילֵיהֶם וְיַלְדֵיהֶם יְרַקֵּדוּן׃
englishText: They send forth their little ones like a flock, And their children dance.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִשְׂאוּ כְּתֹף וְכִנּוֹר וְיִשְׂמְחוּ לְקוֹל עוּגָב׃
englishText: They sing to the timbrel and harp, And rejoice at the sound of the pipe.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יבלו [יְכַלּוּ] בַטּוֹב יְמֵיהֶם וּבְרֶגַע שְׁאוֹל יֵחָתּוּ׃
englishText: They spend their days in prosperity, And peacefully they go down to the grave.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיֹּאמְרוּ לָאֵל סוּר מִמֶּנּוּ וְדַעַת דְּרָכֶיךָ לֹא חָפָצְנוּ׃
englishText: Yet they said unto God: ‘Depart from us; For we desire not the knowledge of Thy ways.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַה־שַׁדַּי כִּי־נַעַבְדֶנּוּ וּמַה־נּוֹעִיל כִּי נִפְגַּע־בּוֹ׃
englishText: What is the Almighty, that we should serve Him? And what profit should we have, if we pray unto Him?’—
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֵן לֹא בְיָדָם טוּבָם עֲצַת רְשָׁעִים רָחֲקָה מֶנִּי׃
englishText: Lo, their prosperity is not in their hand; The counsel of the wicked is far from me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כַּמָּה נֵר־רְשָׁעִים יִדְעָךְ וְיָבֹא עָלֵימוֹ אֵידָם חֲבָלִים יְחַלֵּק בְּאַפּוֹ׃
englishText: How oft is it that the lamp of the wicked is put out? That their calamity cometh upon them? That He distributeth pains in His anger?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִהְיוּ כְּתֶבֶן לִפְנֵי־רוּחַ וּכְמֹץ גְּנָבַתּוּ סוּפָה׃
englishText: That they are as stubble before the wind, And as chaff that the storm stealeth away?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱלוֹהַּ יִצְפֹּן־לְבָנָיו אוֹנוֹ יְשַׁלֵּם אֵלָיו וְיֵדָע׃
englishText: ’God layeth up his iniquity for his children! ’— Let Him recompense it unto himself, that he may know it.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִרְאוּ עינו [עֵינָיו] כִּידוֹ וּמֵחֲמַת שַׁדַּי יִשְׁתֶּה׃
englishText: Let his own eyes see his destruction, And let him drink of the wrath of the Almighty.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי מַה־חֶפְצוֹ בְּבֵיתוֹ אַחֲרָיו וּמִסְפַּר חֳדָשָׁיו חֻצָּצוּ׃
englishText: For what pleasure hath he in his house after him? Seeing the number of his months is determined.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַלְאֵל יְלַמֶּד־דָּעַת וְהוּא רָמִים יִשְׁפּוֹט׃
englishText: Shall any teach God knowledge? Seeing it is He that judgeth those that are high.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זֶה יָמוּת בְּעֶצֶם תֻּמּוֹ כֻּלּוֹ שַׁלְאֲנַן וְשָׁלֵיו׃
englishText: One dieth in his full strength, Being wholly at ease and quiet;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֲטִינָיו מָלְאוּ חָלָב וּמֹחַ עַצְמוֹתָיו יְשֻׁקֶּה׃
englishText: His pails are full of milk, And the marrow of his bones is moistened.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְזֶה יָמוּת בְּנֶפֶשׁ מָרָה וְלֹא־אָכַל בַּטּוֹבָה׃
englishText: And another dieth in bitterness of soul, And hath never tasted of good.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יַחַד עַל־עָפָר יִשְׁכָּבוּ וְרִמָּה תְּכַסֶּה עֲלֵיהֶם׃
englishText: They lie down alike in the dust, And the worm covereth them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֵן יָדַעְתִּי מַחְשְׁבוֹתֵיכֶם וּמְזִמּוֹת עָלַי תַּחְמֹסוּ׃
englishText: Behold, I know your thoughts, And the devices which ye wrongfully imagine against me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי תֹאמְרוּ אַיֵּה בֵית־נָדִיב וְאַיֵּה אֹהֶל מִשְׁכְּנוֹת רְשָׁעִים׃
englishText: For ye say: ‘Where is the house of the prince? And where is the tent wherein the wicked dwelt?’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲלֹא שְׁאֶלְתֶּם עוֹבְרֵי דָרֶךְ וְאֹתֹתָם לֹא תְנַכֵּרוּ׃
englishText: Have ye not asked them that go by the way; And will ye misdeem their tokens,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי לְיוֹם אֵיד יֵחָשֶׂךְ רָע לְיוֹם עֲבָרוֹת יוּבָלוּ׃
englishText: That the evil man is reserved to the day of calamity, That they are led forth to the day of wrath?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִי־יַגִּיד עַל־פָּנָיו דַּרְכּוֹ וְהוּא־עָשָׂה מִי יְשַׁלֶּם־לוֹ׃
englishText: But who shall declare his way to his face? And who shall repay him what he hath done?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְהוּא לִקְבָרוֹת יוּבָל וְעַל־גָּדִישׁ יִשְׁקוֹד׃
englishText: For he is borne to the grave, And watch is kept over his tomb.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מָתְקוּ־לוֹ רִגְבֵי נָחַל וְאַחֲרָיו כָּל־אָדָם יִמְשׁוֹךְ וּלְפָנָיו אֵין מִסְפָּר׃
englishText: The clods of the valley are sweet unto him, And all men draw after him, As there were innumerable before him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֵיךְ תְּנַחֲמוּנִי הָבֶל וּתְשׁוּבֹתֵיכֶם נִשְׁאַר־מָעַל׃
englishText: How then comfort ye me in vain? And as for your answers, there remaineth only faithlessness?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּעַן אֱלִיפַז הַתֵּמָנִי וַיֹּאמַר׃
englishText: Then answered Eliphaz the Temanite, and said:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַלְאֵל יִסְכָּן־גָּבֶר כִּי־יִסְכֹּן עָלֵימוֹ מַשְׂכִּיל׃
englishText: Can a man be profitable unto God? Or can he that is wise be profitable unto Him?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַחֵפֶץ לְשַׁדַּי כִּי תִצְדָּק וְאִם־בֶּצַע כִּי־תַתֵּם דְּרָכֶיךָ׃
englishText: Is it any advantage to the Almighty, that thou art righteous? Or is it gain to Him, that thou makest thy ways blameless?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲמִיִּרְאָתְךָ יֹכִיחֶךָ יָבוֹא עִמְּךָ בַּמִּשְׁפָּט׃
englishText: Is it for thy fear of Him that He reproveth thee, That He entereth with thee into judgment?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲלֹא רָעָתְךָ רַבָּה וְאֵין־קֵץ לַעֲוֺנֹתֶיךָ׃
englishText: Is not thy wickedness great? And are not thine iniquities without end?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־תַחְבֹּל אַחֶיךָ חִנָּם וּבִגְדֵי עֲרוּמִּים תַּפְשִׁיט׃
englishText: For thou hast taken pledges of thy brother for nought, And stripped the naked of their clothing.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־מַיִם עָיֵף תַּשְׁקֶה וּמֵרָעֵב תִּמְנַע־לָחֶם׃
englishText: Thou hast not given water to the weary to drink, And thou hast withholden bread from the hungry.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאִישׁ זְרוֹעַ לוֹ הָאָרֶץ וּנְשׂוּא פָנִים יֵשֶׁב בָּהּ׃
englishText: And as a mighty man, who hath the earth, And as a man of rank, who dwelleth in it,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַלְמָנוֹת שִׁלַּחְתָּ רֵיקָם וּזְרֹעוֹת יְתֹמִים יְדֻכָּא׃
englishText: Thou hast sent widows away empty, And the arms of the fatherless have been broken.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַל־כֵּן סְבִיבוֹתֶיךָ פַחִים וִיבַהֶלְךָ פַּחַד פִּתְאֹם׃
englishText: Therefore snares are round about thee, And sudden dread affrighted thee,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אוֹ־חֹשֶׁךְ לֹא־תִרְאֶה וְשִׁפְעַת־מַיִם תְּכַסֶּךָּ׃
englishText: Or darkness, that thou canst not see, And abundance of waters cover thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲ‍לֹא־אֱלוֹהַּ גֹּבַהּ שָׁמָיִם וּרְאֵה רֹאשׁ כּוֹכָבִים כִּי־רָמּוּ׃
englishText: Is not God in the height of heaven? And behold the topmost of the stars, how high they are!
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאָמַרְתָּ מַה־יָּדַע אֵל הַבְעַד עֲרָפֶל יִשְׁפּוֹט׃
englishText: And thou sayest: ‘What doth God know? Can He judge through the dark cloud?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עָבִים סֵתֶר־לוֹ וְלֹא יִרְאֶה וְחוּג שָׁמַיִם יִתְהַלָּךְ׃
englishText: Thick clouds are a covering to Him, that He seeth not; And He walketh in the circuit of heaven.’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַאֹרַח עוֹלָם תִּשְׁמֹר אֲשֶׁר דָּרְכוּ מְתֵי־אָוֶן׃
englishText: Wilt thou keep the old way Which wicked men have trodden?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲשֶׁר־קֻמְּטוּ וְלֹא־עֵת נָהָר יוּצַק יְסוֹדָם׃
englishText: Who were snatched away before their time, Whose foundation was poured out as a stream;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הָאֹמְרִים לָאֵל סוּר מִמֶּנּוּ וּמַה־יִּפְעַל שַׁדַּי לָמוֹ׃
englishText: Who said unto God: ‘Depart from us’; And what could the Almighty do unto them?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְהוּא מִלֵּא בָתֵּיהֶם טוֹב וַעֲצַת רְשָׁעִים רָחֲקָה מֶנִּי׃
englishText: Yet He filled their houses with good things— But the counsel of the wicked is far from me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִרְאוּ צַדִּיקִים וְיִשְׂמָחוּ וְנָקִי יִלְעַג־לָמוֹ׃
englishText: The righteous saw it, and were glad, And the innocent laugh them to scorn:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־לֹא נִכְחַד קִימָנוּ וְיִתְרָם אָכְלָה אֵשׁ׃
englishText: ’Surely their substance is cut off, And their abundance the fire hath consumed.’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַסְכֶּן־נָא עִמּוֹ וּשְׁלם בָּהֶם תְּבוֹאַתְךָ טוֹבָה׃
englishText: Acquaint now thyself with Him, and be at peace; Thereby shall thine increase be good.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קַח־נָא מִפִּיו תּוֹרָה וְשִׂים אֲמָרָיו בִּלְבָבֶךָ׃
englishText: Receive, I pray thee, instruction from His mouth, And lay up His words in thy heart.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־תָּשׁוּב עַד־שַׁדַּי תִּבָּנֶה תַּרְחִיק עַוְלָה מֵאָהֳלֶךָ׃
englishText: If thou return to the Almighty, thou shalt be built up— If thou put away unrighteousness far from thy tents,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְשִׁית־עַל־עָפָר בָּצֶר וּבְצוּר נְחָלִים אוֹפִיר׃
englishText: And lay thy treasure in the dust, And the gold of Ophir among the stones of the brooks;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְהָיָה שַׁדַּי בְּצָרֶיךָ וְכֶסֶף תּוֹעָפוֹת לָךְ׃
englishText: And the Almighty be thy treasure, And precious silver unto thee;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־אָז עַל־שַׁדַּי תִּתְעַנָּג וְתִשָּׂא אֶל־אֱלוֹהַּ פָּנֶיךָ׃
englishText: Then surely shalt thou have thy delight in the Almighty, And shalt lift up thy face unto God.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תַּעְתִּיר אֵלָיו וְיִשְׁמָעֶךָּ וּנְדָרֶיךָ תְשַׁלֵּם׃
englishText: Thou shalt make thy prayer unto Him, and He will hear thee, And thou shalt pay thy vows;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְתִגְזַר־אוֹמֶר וְיָקָם לָךְ וְעַל־דְּרָכֶיךָ נָגַהּ אוֹר׃
englishText: Thou shalt also decree a thing, and it shall be established unto thee, And light shall shine upon thy ways.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־הִשְׁפִּילוּ וַתֹּאמֶר גֵּוָה וְשַׁח עֵינַיִם יוֹשִׁעַ׃
englishText: When they cast thee down, thou shalt say: ‘There is lifting up’; For the humble person He saveth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְמַלֵּט אִי־נָקִי וְנִמְלַט בְּבֹר כַּפֶּיךָ׃
englishText: He delivereth him that is innocent, Yea, thou shalt be delivered through the cleanness of thy hands.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּעַן אִיּוֹב וַיֹּאמַר׃
englishText: Then Job answered and said:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גַּם־הַיּוֹם מְרִי שִׂחִי יָדִי כָּבְדָה עַל־אַנְחָתִי׃
englishText: Even to-day is my complaint bitter; My hand is become heavy because of my groaning.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִי־יִתֵּן יָדַעְתִּי וְאֶמְצָאֵהוּ אָבוֹא עַד־תְּכוּנָתוֹ׃
englishText: Oh that I knew where I might find Him, That I might come even to His seat!
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֶעֶרְכָה לְפָנָיו מִשְׁפָּט וּפִי אֲמַלֵּא תוֹכָחוֹת׃
englishText: I would order my cause before Him, And fill my mouth with arguments.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֵדְעָה מִלִּים יַעֲנֵנִי וְאָבִינָה מַה־יֹּאמַר לִי׃
englishText: I would know the words which He would answer me, And understand what He would say unto me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַבְּרָב־כֹּחַ יָרִיב עִמָּדִי לֹא אַךְ־הוּא יָשִׂם בִּי׃
englishText: Would He contend with me in His great power? Nay; but He would give heed unto me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׁם יָשָׁר נוֹכָח עִמּוֹ וַאֲפַלְּטָה לָנֶצַח מִשֹּׁפְטִי׃
englishText: There the upright might reason with Him; So should I be delivered for ever from my Judge.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֵן קֶדֶם אֶהֱלֹךְ וְאֵינֶנּוּ וְאָחוֹר וְלֹא־אָבִין לוֹ׃
englishText: Behold, I go forward, but He is not there, And backward, but I cannot perceive Him;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שְׂמֹאול בַּעֲשֹׂתוֹ וְלֹא־אָחַז יַעְטֹף יָמִין וְלֹא אֶרְאֶה׃
englishText: On the left hand, when He doth work, but I cannot behold Him, He turneth Himself to the right hand, but I cannot see Him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־יָדַע דֶּרֶךְ עִמָּדִי בְּחָנַנִי כַּזָּהָב אֵצֵא׃
englishText: For He knoweth the way that I take; When He hath tried me, I shall come forth as gold.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בַּאֲשֻׁרוֹ אָחֲזָה רַגְלִי דַּרְכּוֹ שָׁמַרְתִּי וְלֹא־אָט׃
englishText: My foot hath held fast to His steps, His way have I kept, and turned not aside.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִצְוַת שְׂפָתָיו וְלֹא אָמִישׁ מֵחֻקִּי צָפַנְתִּי אִמְרֵי־פִיו׃
englishText: I have not gone back from the commandment of His lips; I have treasured up the words of His mouth more than my necessary food.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְהוּא בְאֶחָד וּמִי יְשִׁיבֶנּוּ וְנַפְשׁוֹ אִוְּתָה וַיָּעַשׂ׃
englishText: But He is at one with Himself, and who can turn Him? And what His soul desireth, even that He doeth. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי יַשְׁלִים חֻקִּי וְכָהֵנָּה רַבּוֹת עִמּוֹ׃
englishText: For He will perform that which is appointed for me; And many such things are with Him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַל־כֵּן מִפָּנָיו אֶבָּהֵל אֶתְבּוֹנֵן וְאֶפְחַד מִמֶּנּוּ׃
englishText: Therefore am I affrighted at His presence; When I consider, I am afraid of Him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֵל הֵרַךְ לִבִּי וְשַׁדַּי הִבְהִילָנִי׃
englishText: Yea, God hath made my heart faint, And the Almighty hath affrighted me;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־לֹא נִצְמַתִּי מִפְּנֵי־חֹשֶׁךְ וּמִפָּנַי כִּסָּה־אֹפֶל׃
englishText: Because I was not cut off before the darkness, Neither did He cover the thick darkness from my face.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַדּוּעַ מִשַּׁדַּי לֹא־נִצְפְּנוּ עִתִּים וידעו [וְיֹדְעָיו] לֹא־חָזוּ יָמָיו׃
englishText: Why are times not laid up by the Almighty? And why do not they that know Him see His days?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גְּבֻלוֹת יַשִּׂיגוּ עֵדֶר גָּזְלוּ וַיִּרְעוּ׃
englishText: There are that remove the landmarks; They violently take away flocks, and feed them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חֲמוֹר יְתוֹמִים יִנְהָגוּ יַחְבְּלוּ שׁוֹר אַלְמָנָה׃
englishText: They drive away the ass of the fatherless, They take the widow’s ox for a pledge.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יַטּוּ אֶבְיוֹנִים מִדָּרֶךְ יַחַד חֻבְּאוּ עֲנִיֵּי־אָרֶץ׃
englishText: They turn the needy out of the way; The poor of the earth hide themselves together.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֵן פְּרָאִים בַּמִּדְבָּר יָצְאוּ בְּפָעֳלָם מְשַׁחֲרֵי לַטָּרֶף עֲרָבָה לוֹ לֶחֶם לַנְּעָרִים׃
englishText: Behold, as wild asses in the wilderness They go forth to their work, seeking diligently for food; The desert yieldeth them bread for their children.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בַּשָּׂדֶה בְּלִילוֹ יקצירו [יִקְצוֹרוּ] וְכֶרֶם רָשָׁע יְלַקֵּשׁוּ׃
englishText: They cut his provender in the field; And they despoil the vineyard of the wicked.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עָרוֹם יָלִינוּ מִבְּלִי לְבוּשׁ וְאֵין כְּסוּת בַּקָּרָה׃
englishText: They lie all night naked without clothing, And have no covering in the cold.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִזֶּרֶם הָרִים יִרְטָבוּ וּמִבְּלִי מַחְסֶה חִבְּקוּ־צוּר׃
englishText: They are wet with the showers of the mountains, And embrace the rock for want of a shelter.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִגְזְלוּ מִשֹּׁד יָתוֹם וְעַל־עָנִי יַחְבֹּלוּ׃
englishText: There are that pluck the fatherless from the breast, And take a pledge of the poor;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עָרוֹם הִלְּכוּ בְּלִי לְבוּשׁ וּרְעֵבִים נָשְׂאוּ עֹמֶר׃
englishText: So that they go about naked without clothing, And being hungry they carry the sheaves;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בֵּין־שׁוּרֹתָם יַצְהִירוּ יְקָבִים דָּרְכוּ וַיִּצְמָאוּ׃
englishText: They make oil within the rows of these men; They tread their winepresses, and suffer thirst.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מֵעִיר מְתִים יִנְאָקוּ וְנֶפֶשׁ־חֲלָלִים תְּשַׁוֵּעַ וֶאֱלוֹהַּ לֹא־יָשִׂים תִּפְלָה׃
englishText: From out of the populous city men groan, And the soul of the wounded crieth out; Yet God imputeth it not for unseemliness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֵמָּה הָיוּ בְּמֹרְדֵי־אוֹר לֹא־הִכִּירוּ דְרָכָיו וְלֹא יָשְׁבוּ בִּנְתִיבֹתָיו׃
englishText: These are of them that rebel against the light; They know not the ways thereof, nor abide in the paths thereof.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לָאוֹר יָקוּם רוֹצֵחַ יִקְטָל־עָנִי וְאֶבְיוֹן וּבַלַּיְלָה יְהִי כַגַּנָּב׃
englishText: The murderer riseth with the light, to kill the poor and needy; And in the night he is as a thief.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְעֵין נֹאֵף שָׁמְרָה נֶשֶׁף לֵאמֹר לֹא־תְשׁוּרֵנִי עָיִן וְסֵתֶר פָּנִים יָשִׂים׃
englishText: The eye also of the adulterer waiteth for the twilight, Saying: ‘No eye shall see me’; And he putteth a covering on his face. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חָתַר בַּחֹשֶׁךְ בָּתִּים יוֹמָם חִתְּמוּ־לָמוֹ לֹא־יָדְעוּ אוֹר׃
englishText: In the dark they dig through houses; They shut themselves up in the day-time; They know not the light.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי יַחְדָּו בֹּקֶר לָמוֹ צַלְמָוֶת כִּי־יַכִּיר בַּלְהוֹת צַלְמָוֶת׃
englishText: For the shadow of death is to all of them as the morning; For they know the terrors of the shadow of death.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קַל־הוּא עַל־פְּנֵי־מַיִם תְּקֻלַּל חֶלְקָתָם בָּאָרֶץ לֹא־יִפְנֶה דֶּרֶךְ כְּרָמִים׃
englishText: He is swift upon the face of the waters; Their portion is cursed in the earth; He turneth not by the way of the vineyards.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: צִיָּה גַם־חֹם יִגְזְלוּ מֵימֵי־שֶׁלֶג שְׁאוֹל חָטָאוּ׃
englishText: Drought and heat consume the snow waters; So doth the nether-world those that have sinned.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִשְׁכָּחֵהוּ רֶחֶם מְתָקוֹ רִמָּה עוֹד לֹא־יִזָּכֵר וַתִּשָּׁבֵר כָּעֵץ עַוְלָה׃
englishText: The womb forgetteth him; the worm feedeth sweetly on him; He shall be no more remembered; And unrighteousness is broken as a tree.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רֹעֶה עֲקָרָה לֹא תֵלֵד וְאַלְמָנָה לֹא יְיֵטִיב׃
englishText: He devoureth the barren that beareth not; And doeth not good to the widow.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמָשַׁךְ אַבִּירִים בְּכֹחוֹ יָקוּם וְלֹא־יַאֲמִין בַּחַיִּין׃
englishText: He draweth away the mighty also by his power; He riseth up, and he trusteth not his own life.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִתֶּן־לוֹ לָבֶטַח וְיִשָּׁעֵן וְעֵינֵיהוּ עַל־דַּרְכֵיהֶם׃
englishText: Though it be given him to be in safety, whereon he resteth, Yet His eyes are upon their ways.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רוֹמּוּ מְּעַט וְאֵינֶנּוּ וְהֻמְּכוּ כַּכֹּל יִקָּפְצוּן וּכְרֹאשׁ שִׁבֹּלֶת יִמָּלוּ׃
englishText: They are exalted for a little while, and they are gone; Yea, they are brought low, they are gathered in as all others, And wither as the tops of the ears of corn.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאִם־לֹא אֵפוֹ מִי יַכְזִיבֵנִי וְיָשֵׂם לְאַל מִלָּתִי׃
englishText: And if it be not so now, who will prove me a liar, And make my speech nothing worth?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּעַן בִּלְדַּד הַשֻּׁחִי וַיֹּאמַר׃
englishText: Then answered Bildad the Shuhite, and said:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַמְשֵׁל וָפַחַד עִמּוֹ עֹשֶׂה שָׁלוֹם בִּמְרוֹמָיו׃
englishText: Dominion and fear are with Him; He maketh peace in His high places.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲיֵשׁ מִסְפָּר לִגְדוּדָיו וְעַל־מִי לֹא־יָקוּם אוֹרֵהוּ׃
englishText: Is there any number of His armies? And upon whom doth not His light arise?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמַה־יִּצְדַּק אֱנוֹשׁ עִם־אֵל וּמַה־יִּזְכֶּה יְלוּד אִשָּׁה׃
englishText: How then can man be just with God? Or how can he be clean that is born of a woman?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֵן עַד־יָרֵחַ וְלֹא יַאֲהִיל וְכוֹכָבִים לֹא־זַכּוּ בְעֵינָיו׃
englishText: Behold, even the moon hath no brightness, And the stars are not pure in His sight;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַף כִּי־אֱנוֹשׁ רִמָּה וּבֶן־אָדָם תּוֹלֵעָה׃
englishText: How much less man, that is a worm! And the son of man, that is a maggot!
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּעַן אִיּוֹב וַיֹּאמַר׃
englishText: Then Job answered and said:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מֶה־עָזַרְתָּ לְלֹא־כֹחַ הוֹשַׁעְתָּ זְרוֹעַ לֹא־עֹז׃
englishText: How hast thou helped him that is without power! How hast thou saved the arm that hath no strength!
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַה־יָּעַצְתָּ לְלֹא חָכְמָה וְתוּשִׁיָּה לָרֹב הוֹדָעְתָּ׃
englishText: How hast thou counselled him that hath no wisdom, And plentifully declared sound knowledge!
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֶת־מִי הִגַּדְתָּ מִלִּין וְנִשְׁמַת־מִי יָצְאָה מִמֶּךָּ׃
englishText: With whose help hast thou uttered words? And whose spirit came forth from thee?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הָרְפָאִים יְחוֹלָלוּ מִתַּחַת מַיִם וְשֹׁכְנֵיהֶם׃
englishText: The shades tremble Beneath the waters and the inhabitants thereof.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עָרוֹם שְׁאוֹל נֶגְדּוֹ וְאֵין כְּסוּת לָאֲבַדּוֹן׃
englishText: The nether-world is naked before Him, And Destruction hath no covering.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נֹטֶה צָפוֹן עַל־תֹּהוּ תֹּלֶה אֶרֶץ עַל־בְּלִי־מָה׃
englishText: He stretcheth out the north over the empty space, And hangeth the earth over nothing.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: צֹרֵר־מַיִם בְּעָבָיו וְלֹא־נִבְקַע עָנָן תַּחְתָּם׃
englishText: He bindeth up the waters in His thick clouds; And the cloud is not rent under them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מְאַחֵז פְּנֵי־כִסֵּה פַּרְשֵׁז עָלָיו עֲנָנוֹ׃
englishText: He closeth in the face of His throne, And spreadeth His cloud upon it.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חֹק־חָג עַל־פְּנֵי־מָיִם עַד־תַּכְלִית אוֹר עִם־חֹשֶׁךְ׃
englishText: He hath described a boundary upon the face of the waters, Unto the confines of light and darkness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַמּוּדֵי שָׁמַיִם יְרוֹפָפוּ וְיִתְמְהוּ מִגַּעֲרָתוֹ׃
englishText: The pillars of heaven tremble And are astonished at His rebuke.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּכֹחוֹ רָגַע הַיָּם ובתובנתו [וּבִתְבוּנָתוֹ] מָחַץ רָהַב׃
englishText: He stirreth up the sea with His power, And by His understanding He smiteth through Rahab.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּרוּחוֹ שָׁמַיִם שִׁפְרָה חֹלֲלָה יָדוֹ נָחָשׁ בָּרִיחַ׃
englishText: By His breath the heavens are serene; His hand hath pierced the slant serpent.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֶן־אֵלֶּה קְצוֹת דרכו [דְּרָכָיו] וּמַה־שֵּׁמֶץ דָּבָר נִשְׁמַע־בּוֹ וְרַעַם גבורתו [גְּבוּרוֹתָיו] מִי יִתְבּוֹנָן׃
englishText: Lo, these are but the outskirts of His ways; And how small a whisper is heard of Him! But the thunder of His mighty deeds who can understand?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיֹּסֶף אִיּוֹב שְׂאֵת מְשָׁלוֹ וַיֹּאמַר׃
englishText: And Job again took up his parable, and said:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חַי־אֵל הֵסִיר מִשְׁפָּטִי וְשַׁדַּי הֵמַר נַפְשִׁי׃
englishText: As God liveth, who hath taken away my right; And the Almighty, who hath dealt bitterly with me;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־כָל־עוֹד נִשְׁמָתִי בִי וְרוּחַ אֱלוֹהַּ בְּאַפִּי׃
englishText: All the while my breath is in me And the spirit of God is in my nostrils,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־תְּדַבֵּרְנָה שְׂפָתַי עַוְלָה וּלְשׁוֹנִי אִם־יֶהְגֶּה רְמִיָּה׃
englishText: Surely my lips shall not speak unrighteousness, Neither shall my tongue utter deceit;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חָלִילָה לִּי אִם־אַצְדִּיק אֶתְכֶם עַד־אֶגְוָע לֹא־אָסִיר תֻּמָּתִי מִמֶּנִּי׃
englishText: Far be it from me that I should justify you; Till I die I will not put away mine integrity from me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּצִדְקָתִי הֶחֱזַקְתִּי וְלֹא אַרְפֶּהָ לֹא־יֶחֱרַף לְבָבִי מִיָּמָי׃
englishText: My righteousness I hold fast, and will not let it go; My heart shall not reproach me so long as I live.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהִי כְרָשָׁע אֹיְבִי וּמִתְקוֹמְמִי כְעַוָּל׃
englishText: Let mine enemy be as the wicked, And let him that riseth up against me be as the unrighteous.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי מַה־תִּקְוַת חָנֵף כִּי יִבְצָע כִּי יֵשֶׁל אֱלוֹהַּ נַפְשׁוֹ׃
englishText: For what is the hope of the godless, though he get him gain, When God taketh away his soul?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַצַעֲקָתוֹ יִשְׁמַע אֵל כִּי־תָבוֹא עָלָיו צָרָה׃
englishText: Will God hear his cry, When trouble cometh upon him?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־עַל־שַׁדַּי יִתְעַנָּג יִקְרָא אֱלוֹהַּ בְּכָל־עֵת׃
englishText: Will he have his delight in the Almighty, And call upon God at all times?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אוֹרֶה אֶתְכֶם בְּיַד־אֵל אֲשֶׁר עִם־שַׁדַּי לֹא אֲכַחֵד׃
englishText: I will teach you concerning the hand of God; That which is with the Almighty will I not conceal.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֵן־אַתֶּם כֻּלְּכֶם חֲזִיתֶם וְלָמָּה־זֶּה הֶבֶל תֶּהְבָּלוּ׃
englishText: Behold, all ye yourselves have seen it; Why then are ye become altogether vain?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זֶה חֵלֶק־אָדָם רָשָׁע עִם־אֵל וְנַחֲלַת עָרִיצִים מִשַּׁדַּי יִקָּחוּ׃
englishText: This is the portion of a wicked man with God, And the heritage of oppressors, which they receive from the Almighty.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־יִרְבּוּ בָנָיו לְמוֹ־חָרֶב וְצֶאֱצָאָיו לֹא יִשְׂבְּעוּ־לָחֶם׃
englishText: If his children be multiplied, it is for the sword; And his offspring shall not have bread enough.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שרידו [שְׂרִידָיו] בַּמָּוֶת יִקָּבֵרוּ וְאַלְמְנֹתָיו לֹא תִבְכֶּינָה׃
englishText: Those that remain of him shall be buried by pestilence, And his widows shall make no lamentation.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־יִצְבֹּר כֶּעָפָר כָּסֶף וְכַחֹמֶר יָכִין מַלְבּוּשׁ׃
englishText: Though he heap up silver as the dust, And prepare raiment as the clay;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָכִין וְצַדִּיק יִלְבָּשׁ וְכֶסֶף נָקִי יַחֲלֹק׃
englishText: He may prepare it, but the just shall put it on, And the innocent shall divide the silver.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בָּנָה כָעָשׁ בֵּיתוֹ וּכְסֻכָּה עָשָׂה נֹצֵר׃
englishText: He buildeth his house as a moth, And as a booth which the keeper maketh.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עָשִׁיר יִשְׁכַּב וְלֹא יֵאָסֵף עֵינָיו פָּקַח וְאֵינֶנּוּ׃
englishText: He lieth down rich, but there shall be nought to gather; He openeth his eyes, and his wealth is not.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תַּשִּׂיגֵהוּ כַמַּיִם בַּלָּהוֹת לַיְלָה גְּנָבַתּוּ סוּפָה׃
englishText: Terrors overtake him like waters; A tempest stealeth him away in the night.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִשָּׂאֵהוּ קָדִים וְיֵלַךְ וִישָׂעֲרֵהוּ מִמְּקֹמוֹ׃
englishText: The east wind carrieth him away, and he departeth; And it sweepeth him out of his place.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְיַשְׁלֵךְ עָלָיו וְלֹא יַחְמֹל מִיָּדוֹ בָּרוֹחַ יִבְרָח׃
englishText: Yea, it hurleth at him, and spareth not; He would fain flee from its power.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִשְׂפֹּק עָלֵימוֹ כַפֵּימוֹ וְיִשְׁרֹק עָלָיו מִמְּקֹמוֹ׃
englishText: Men shall clap their hands at him, And shall hiss him out of his place.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי יֵשׁ לַכֶּסֶף מוֹצָא וּמָקוֹם לַזָּהָב יָזֹקּוּ׃
englishText: For there is a mine for silver, And a place for gold which they refine.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בַּרְזֶל מֵעָפָר יֻקָּח וְאֶבֶן יָצוּק נְחוּשָׁה׃
englishText: Iron is taken out of the dust, And brass is molten out of the stone.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קֵץ שָׂם לַחֹשֶׁךְ וּלְכָל־תַּכְלִית הוּא חוֹקֵר אֶבֶן אֹפֶל וְצַלְמָוֶת׃
englishText: Man setteth an end to darkness, And searcheth out to the furthest bound The stones of thick darkness and of the shadow of death.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פָּרַץ נַחַל מֵעִם־גָּר הַנִּשְׁכָּחִים מִנִּי־רָגֶל דַּלּוּ מֵאֱנוֹשׁ נָעוּ׃
englishText: He breaketh open a shaft away from where men sojourn; They are forgotten of the foot that passeth by; They hang afar from men, they swing to and fro.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֶרֶץ מִמֶּנָּה יֵצֵא־לָחֶם וְתַחְתֶּיהָ נֶהְפַּךְ כְּמוֹ־אֵשׁ׃
englishText: As for the earth, out of it cometh bread, And underneath it is turned up as it were by fire.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מְקוֹם־סַפִּיר אֲבָנֶיהָ וְעַפְרֹת זָהָב לוֹ׃
englishText: The stones thereof are the place of sapphires, And it hath dust of gold.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נָתִיב לֹא־יְדָעוֹ עָיִט וְלֹא שְׁזָפַתּוּ עֵין אַיָּה׃
englishText: That path no bird of prey knoweth, Neither hath the falcon’s eye seen it;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־הִדְרִיכֻהוּ בְנֵי־שָׁחַץ לֹא־עָדָה עָלָיו שָׁחַל׃
englishText: The proud beasts have not trodden it, Nor hath the lion passed thereby.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בַּחַלָּמִישׁ שָׁלַח יָדוֹ הָפַךְ מִשֹּׁרֶשׁ הָרִים׃
englishText: He putteth forth his hand upon the flinty rock; He overturneth the mountains by the roots.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בַּצּוּרוֹת יְאֹרִים בִּקֵּעַ וְכָל־יְקָר רָאֲתָה עֵינוֹ׃
englishText: He cutteth out channels among the rocks; And his eye seeth every precious thing. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִבְּכִי נְהָרוֹת חִבֵּשׁ וְתַעֲלֻמָהּ יֹצִא אוֹר׃
englishText: He bindeth the streams that they trickle not; And the thing that is hid bringeth he forth to light.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְהַחָכְמָה מֵאַיִן תִּמָּצֵא וְאֵי זֶה מְקוֹם בִּינָה׃
englishText: But wisdom, where shall it be found? And where is the place of understanding?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־יָדַע אֱנוֹשׁ עֶרְכָּהּ וְלֹא תִמָּצֵא בְּאֶרֶץ הַחַיִּים׃
englishText: Man knoweth not the price thereof; Neither is it found in the land of the living.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תְּהוֹם אָמַר לֹא בִי־הִיא וְיָם אָמַר אֵין עִמָּדִי׃
