englishText: The deep saith: ‘It is not in me’; And the sea saith: ‘It is not with me.’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־יֻתַּן סְגוֹר תַּחְתֶּיהָ וְלֹא יִשָּׁקֵל כֶּסֶף מְחִירָהּ׃
englishText: It cannot be gotten for gold, Neither shall silver be weighed for the price thereof.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־תְסֻלֶּה בְּכֶתֶם אוֹפִיר בְּשֹׁהַם יָקָר וְסַפִּיר׃
englishText: It cannot be valued with the gold of Ophir, With the precious onyx, or the sapphire.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־יַעַרְכֶנָּה זָהָב וּזְכוֹכִית וּתְמוּרָתָהּ כְּלִי־פָז׃
englishText: Gold and glass cannot equal it; Neither shall the exchange thereof be vessels of fine gold.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רָאמוֹת וְגָבִישׁ לֹא יִזָּכֵר וּמֶשֶׁךְ חָכְמָה מִפְּנִינִים׃
englishText: No mention shall be made of coral or of crystal; Yea, the price of wisdom is above rubies.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־יַעַרְכֶנָּה פִּטְדַת־כּוּשׁ בְּכֶתֶם טָהוֹר לֹא תְסֻלֶּה׃
englishText: The topaz of Ethiopia shall not equal it, Neither shall it be valued with pure gold.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְהַחָכְמָה מֵאַיִן תָּבוֹא וְאֵי זֶה מְקוֹם בִּינָה׃
englishText: Whence then cometh wisdom? And where is the place of understanding?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְנֶעֶלְמָה מֵעֵינֵי כָל־חָי וּמֵעוֹף הַשָּׁמַיִם נִסְתָּרָה׃
englishText: Seeing it is hid from the eyes of all living, And kept close from the fowls of the air.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲבַדּוֹן וָמָוֶת אָמְרוּ בְּאָזְנֵינוּ שָׁמַעְנוּ שִׁמְעָהּ׃
englishText: Destruction and Death say: ‘We have heard a rumor thereof with our ears.’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱלֹהִים הֵבִין דַּרְכָּהּ וְהוּא יָדַע אֶת־מְקוֹמָהּ׃
englishText: God understandeth the way thereof, And He knoweth the place thereof.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־הוּא לִקְצוֹת־הָאָרֶץ יַבִּיט תַּחַת כָּל־הַשָּׁמַיִם יִרְאֶה׃
englishText: For He looketh to the ends of the earth, And seeth under the whole heaven;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַעֲשׂוֹת לָרוּחַ מִשְׁקָל וּמַיִם תִּכֵּן בְּמִדָּה׃
englishText: When He maketh a weight for the wind, And meteth out the waters by measure.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בַּעֲשֹׂתוֹ לַמָּטָר חֹק וְדֶרֶךְ לַחֲזִיז קֹלוֹת׃
englishText: When He made a decree for the rain, And a way for the storm of thunders;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָז רָאָהּ וַיְסַפְּרָהּ הֱכִינָהּ וְגַם־חֲקָרָהּ׃
englishText: Then did He see it, and declare it; He established it, yea, and searched it out.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיֹּאמֶר לָאָדָם הֵן יִרְאַת אֲדֹנָי הִיא חָכְמָה וְסוּר מֵרָע בִּינָה׃
englishText: And unto man He said: ‘Behold, the fear of the Lord, that is wisdom; And to depart from evil is understanding.’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיֹּסֶף אִיּוֹב שְׂאֵת מְשָׁלוֹ וַיֹּאמַר׃
englishText: And Job again took up his parable, and said:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִי־יִתְּנֵנִי כְיַרְחֵי־קֶדֶם כִּימֵי אֱלוֹהַּ יִשְׁמְרֵנִי׃
englishText: Oh that I were as in the months of old, As in the days when God watched over me;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּהִלּוֹ נֵרוֹ עֲלֵי רֹאשִׁי לְאוֹרוֹ אֵלֶךְ חֹשֶׁךְ׃
englishText: When His lamp shined above my head, And by His light I walked through darkness;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כַּאֲשֶׁר הָיִיתִי בִּימֵי חָרְפִּי בְּסוֹד אֱלוֹהַּ עֲלֵי אָהֳלִי׃
englishText: As I was in the days of my youth, When the converse of God was upon my tent;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּעוֹד שַׁדַּי עִמָּדִי סְבִיבוֹתַי נְעָרָי׃
englishText: When the Almighty was yet with me, And my children were about me;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בִּרְחֹץ הֲלִיכַי בְּחֵמָה וְצוּר יָצוּק עִמָּדִי פַּלְגֵי־שָׁמֶן׃
englishText: When my steps were washed with butter, And the rock poured me out rivers of oil!
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּצֵאתִי שַׁעַר עֲלֵי־קָרֶת בָּרְחוֹב אָכִין מוֹשָׁבִי׃
englishText: When I went forth to the gate unto the city, When I prepared my seat in the broad place,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רָאוּנִי נְעָרִים וְנֶחְבָּאוּ וִישִׁישִׁים קָמוּ עָמָדוּ׃
englishText: The young men saw me and hid themselves, And the aged rose up and stood;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׂרִים עָצְרוּ בְמִלִּים וְכַף יָשִׂימוּ לְפִיהֶם׃
englishText: The princes refrained talking, And laid their hand on their mouth;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קוֹל־נְגִידִים נֶחְבָּאוּ וּלְשׁוֹנָם לְחִכָּם דָּבֵקָה׃
englishText: The voice of the nobles was hushed, And their tongue cleaved to the roof of their mouth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי אֹזֶן שָׁמְעָה וַתְּאַשְּׁרֵנִי וְעַיִן רָאֲתָה וַתְּעִידֵנִי׃
englishText: For when the ear heard me, then it blessed me, And when the eye saw me, it gave witness unto me;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־אֲמַלֵּט עָנִי מְשַׁוֵּעַ וְיָתוֹם וְלֹא־עֹזֵר לוֹ׃
englishText: Because I delivered the poor that cried, The fatherless also, that had none to help him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בִּרְכַּת אֹבֵד עָלַי תָּבֹא וְלֵב אַלְמָנָה אַרְנִן׃
englishText: The blessing of him that was ready to perish came upon me; and I caused the widow’s heart to sing for joy.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: צֶדֶק לָבַשְׁתִּי וַיִּלְבָּשֵׁנִי כִּמְעִיל וְצָנִיף מִשְׁפָּטִי׃
englishText: I put on righteousness, and it clothed itself with me; My justice was as a robe and a diadem.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֵינַיִם הָיִיתִי לַעִוֵּר וְרַגְלַיִם לַפִּסֵּחַ אָנִי׃
englishText: I was eyes to the blind, And feet was I to the lame.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָב אָנֹכִי לָאֶבְיוֹנִים וְרִב לֹא־יָדַעְתִּי אֶחְקְרֵהוּ׃
englishText: I was a father to the needy; And the cause of him that I knew not I searched out.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וָאֲשַׁבְּרָה מְתַלְּעוֹת עַוָּל וּמִשִּׁנָּיו אַשְׁלִיךְ טָרֶף׃
englishText: And I broke the jaws of the unrighteous, And plucked the prey out of his teeth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וָאֹמַר עִם־קִנִּי אֶגְוָע וְכַחוֹל אַרְבֶּה יָמִים׃
englishText: Then I said: ‘I shall die with my nest, And I shall multiply my days as the phoenix;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׁרְשִׁי פָתוּחַ אֱלֵי־מָיִם וְטַל יָלִין בִּקְצִירִי׃
englishText: My root shall be spread out to the waters, And the dew shall lie all night upon my branch;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כְּבוֹדִי חָדָשׁ עִמָּדִי וְקַשְׁתִּי בְּיָדִי תַחֲלִיף׃
englishText: My glory shall be fresh in me, And my bow shall be renewed in my hand.’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לִי־שָׁמְעוּ וְיִחֵלּוּ וְיִדְּמוּ לְמוֹ עֲצָתִי׃
englishText: Unto me men gave ear, and waited, And kept silence for my counsel.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַחֲרֵי דְבָרִי לֹא יִשְׁנוּ וְעָלֵימוֹ תִּטֹּף מִלָּתִי׃
englishText: After my words they spoke not again; And my speech dropped upon them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְיִחֲלוּ כַמָּטָר לִי וּפִיהֶם פָּעֲרוּ לְמַלְקוֹשׁ׃
englishText: And they waited for me as for the rain; And they opened their mouth wide as for the latter rain.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֶשְׂחַק אֲלֵהֶם לֹא יַאֲמִינוּ וְאוֹר פָּנַי לֹא יַפִּילוּן׃
englishText: If I laughed on them, they believed it not; And the light of my countenance they cast not down.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֶבֲחַר דַּרְכָּם וְאֵשֵׁב רֹאשׁ וְאֶשְׁכּוֹן כְּמֶלֶךְ בַּגְּדוּד כַּאֲשֶׁר אֲבֵלִים יְנַחֵם׃
englishText: I chose out their way, and sat as chief, And dwelt as a king in the army, As one that comforteth the mourners.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְעַתָּה שָׂחֲקוּ עָלַי צְעִירִים מִמֶּנִּי לְיָמִים אֲשֶׁר־מָאַסְתִּי אֲבוֹתָם לָשִׁית עִם־כַּלְבֵי צֹאנִי׃
englishText: But now they that are younger than I have me in derision, Whose fathers I disdained to set with the dogs of my flock.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גַּם־כֹּחַ יְדֵיהֶם לָמָּה לִּי עָלֵימוֹ אָבַד כָּלַח׃
englishText: Yea, the strength of their hands, whereto should it profit me? Men in whom ripe age is perished.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּחֶסֶר וּבְכָפָן גַּלְמוּד הַעֹרְקִים צִיָּה אֶמֶשׁ שׁוֹאָה וּמְשֹׁאָה׃
englishText: They are gaunt with want and famine; They gnaw the dry ground, in the gloom of wasteness and desolation.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַקֹּטְפִים מַלּוּחַ עֲלֵי־שִׂיחַ וְשֹׁרֶשׁ רְתָמִים לַחְמָם׃
englishText: They pluck salt-wort with wormwood; And the roots of the broom are their food.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִן־גֵּו יְגֹרָשׁוּ יָרִיעוּ עָלֵימוֹ כַּגַּנָּב׃
englishText: They are driven forth from the midst of men; They cry after them as after a thief.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בַּעֲרוּץ נְחָלִים לִשְׁכֹּן חֹרֵי עָפָר וְכֵפִים׃
englishText: In the clefts of the valleys must they dwell, In holes of the earth and of the rocks.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בֵּין־שִׂיחִים יִנְהָקוּ תַּחַת חָרוּל יְסֻפָּחוּ׃
englishText: Among the bushes they bray; Under the nettles they are gathered together.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנֵי־נָבָל גַּם־בְּנֵי בְלִי־שֵׁם נִכְּאוּ מִן־הָאָרֶץ׃
englishText: They are children of churls, yea, children of ignoble men; They were scourged out of the land.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְעַתָּה נְגִינָתָם הָיִיתִי וָאֱהִי לָהֶם לְמִלָּה׃
englishText: And now I am become their song, Yea, I am a byword unto them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תִּעֲבוּנִי רָחֲקוּ מֶנִּי וּמִפָּנַי לֹא־חָשְׂכוּ רֹק׃
englishText: They abhor me, they flee far from me, And spare not to spit in my face.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־יתרו [יִתְרִי] פִתַּח וַיְעַנֵּנִי וְרֶסֶן מִפָּנַי שִׁלֵּחוּ׃
englishText: For He hath loosed my cord, and afflicted me, And they have cast off the bridle before me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַל־יָמִין פִּרְחַח יָקוּמוּ רַגְלַי שִׁלֵּחוּ וַיָּסֹלּוּ עָלַי אָרְחוֹת אֵידָם׃
englishText: Upon my right hand rise the brood; They entangle my feet, And they cast up against me their ways of destruction.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נָתְסוּ נְתִיבָתִי לְהַוָּתִי יֹעִילוּ לֹא עֹזֵר לָמוֹ׃
englishText: They break up my path, They further my calamity, Even men that have no helper.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כְּפֶרֶץ רָחָב יֶאֱתָיוּ תַּחַת שֹׁאָה הִתְגַּלְגָּלוּ׃
englishText: As through a wide breach they come; In the midst of the ruin they roll themselves upon me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הָהְפַּךְ עָלַי בַּלָּהוֹת תִּרְדֹּף כָּרוּחַ נְדִבָתִי וּכְעָב עָבְרָה יְשֻׁעָתִי׃
englishText: Terrors are turned upon me, They chase mine honour as the wind; And my welfare is passed away as a cloud.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְעַתָּה עָלַי תִּשְׁתַּפֵּךְ נַפְשִׁי יֹאחֲזוּנִי יְמֵי־עֹנִי׃
englishText: And now my soul is poured out within me; Days of affliction have taken hold upon me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַיְלָה עֲצָמַי נִקַּר מֵעָלָי וְעֹרְקַי לֹא יִשְׁכָּבוּן׃
englishText: In the night my bones are pierced, and fall from me, And my sinews take no rest.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּרָב־כֹּחַ יִתְחַפֵּשׂ לְבוּשִׁי כְּפִי כֻתָּנְתִּי יַאַזְרֵנִי׃
englishText: By the great force [of my disease] is my garment disfigured; It bindeth me about as the collar of my coat.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֹרָנִי לַחֹמֶר וָאֶתְמַשֵּׁל כֶּעָפָר וָאֵפֶר׃
englishText: He hath cast me into the mire, And I am become like dust and ashes.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲשַׁוַּע אֵלֶיךָ וְלֹא תַעֲנֵנִי עָמַדְתִּי וַתִּתְבֹּנֶן בִּי׃
englishText: I cry unto Thee, and Thou dost not answer me; I stand up, and Thou lookest at me. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תֵּהָפֵךְ לְאַכְזָר לִי בְּעֹצֶם יָדְךָ תִשְׂטְמֵנִי׃
englishText: Thou art turned to be cruel to me; With the might of Thy hand Thou hatest me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תִּשָּׂאֵנִי אֶל־רוּחַ תַּרְכִּיבֵנִי וּתְמֹגְגֵנִי תשוה [תּוּשִׁיָּה׃]
englishText: Thou liftest me up to the wind, Thou causest me to ride upon it; And Thou dissolvest my substance.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־יָדַעְתִּי מָוֶת תְּשִׁיבֵנִי וּבֵית מוֹעֵד לְכָל־חָי׃
englishText: For I know that Thou wilt bring me to death, And to the house appointed for all living.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַךְ לֹא־בְעִי יִשְׁלַח־יָד אִם־בְּפִידוֹ לָהֶן שׁוּעַ׃
englishText: Surely none shall put forth his hand to a ruinous heap, Neither because of these things shall help come in one’s calamity,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־לֹא בָכִיתִי לִקְשֵׁה־יוֹם עָגְמָה נַפְשִׁי לָאֶבְיוֹן׃
englishText: If I have not wept for him that was in trouble, And if my soul grieved not for the needy.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי טוֹב קִוִּיתִי וַיָּבֹא רָע וַאֲיַחֲלָה לְאוֹר וַיָּבֹא אֹפֶל׃
englishText: Yet, when I looked for good, there came evil; And when I waited for light, there came darkness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מֵעַי רֻתְּחוּ וְלֹא־דָמּוּ קִדְּמֻנִי יְמֵי־עֹנִי׃
englishText: Mine inwards boil, and rest not; Days of affliction are come upon me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קֹדֵר הִלַּכְתִּי בְּלֹא חַמָּה קַמְתִּי בַקָּהָל אֲשַׁוֵּעַ׃
englishText: I go mourning without the sun; I stand up in the assembly, and cry for help.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָח הָיִיתִי לְתַנִּים וְרֵעַ לִבְנוֹת יַעֲנָה׃
englishText: I am become a brother to jackals, And a companion to ostriches.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עוֹרִי שָׁחַר מֵעָלָי וְעַצְמִי־חָרָה מִנִּי־חֹרֶב׃
englishText: My skin is black, and falleth from me, And my bones are burned with heat.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיְהִי לְאֵבֶל כִּנֹּרִי וְעֻגָבִי לְקוֹל בֹּכִים׃
englishText: Therefore is my harp turned to mourning, And my pipe into the voice of them that weep.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּרִית כָּרַתִּי לְעֵינָי וּמָה אֶתְבּוֹנֵן עַל־בְּתוּלָה׃
englishText: I made a covenant with mine eyes; How then should I look upon a maid?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמֶה חֵלֶק אֱלוֹהַּ מִמָּעַל וְנַחֲלַת שַׁדַּי מִמְּרֹמִים׃
englishText: For what would be the portion of God from above, And the heritage of the Almighty from on high?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲלֹא־אֵיד לְעַוָּל וְנֵכֶר לְפֹעֲלֵי אָוֶן׃
englishText: Is it not calamity to the unrighteous, And disaster to the workers of iniquity?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲלֹא־הוּא יִרְאֶה דְרָכָי וְכָל־צְעָדַי יִסְפּוֹר׃
englishText: Doth not He see my ways, And count all my steps?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־הָלַכְתִּי עִם־שָׁוְא וַתַּחַשׁ עַל־מִרְמָה רַגְלִי׃
englishText: If I have walked with vanity, And my foot hath hasted to deceit—
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִשְׁקְלֵנִי בְמֹאזְנֵי־צֶדֶק וְיֵדַע אֱלוֹהַּ תֻּמָּתִי׃
englishText: Let me be weighed in a just balance, That God may know mine integrity—
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם תִּטֶּה אַשֻּׁרִי מִנִּי הַדָּרֶךְ וְאַחַר עֵינַי הָלַךְ לִבִּי וּבְכַפַּי דָּבַק מֻאוּם׃
englishText: If my step hath turned out of the way, And my heart walked after mine eyes, And if any spot hath cleaved to my hands;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֶזְרְעָה וְאַחֵר יֹאכֵל וְצֶאֱצָאַי יְשֹׁרָשׁוּ׃
englishText: Then let me sow, and let another eat; Yea, let the produce of my field be rooted out.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־נִפְתָּה לִבִּי עַל־אִשָּׁה וְעַל־פֶּתַח רֵעִי אָרָבְתִּי׃
englishText: If my heart have been enticed unto a woman, And I have lain in wait at my neighbour’s door;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תִּטְחַן לְאַחֵר אִשְׁתִּי וְעָלֶיהָ יִכְרְעוּן אֲחֵרִין׃
englishText: Then let my wife grind unto another, And let others bow down upon her. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־הוא [הִיא] זִמָּה והיא [וְהוּא] עָוֺן פְּלִילִים׃
englishText: For that were a heinous crime; Yea, it were an iniquity to be punished by the judges.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי אֵשׁ הִיא עַד־אֲבַדּוֹן תֹּאכֵל וּבְכָל־תְּבוּאָתִי תְשָׁרֵשׁ׃
englishText: For it is a fire that consumeth unto destruction, And would root out all mine increase.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־אֶמְאַס מִשְׁפַּט עַבְדִּי וַאֲמָתִי בְּרִבָם עִמָּדִי׃
englishText: If I did despise the cause of my man-servant, Or of my maid-servant, when they contended with me—
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמָה אֶעֱשֶׂה כִּי־יָקוּם אֵל וְכִי־יִפְקֹד מָה אֲשִׁיבֶנּוּ׃
englishText: What then shall I do when God riseth up? And when He remembereth, what shall I answer Him?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲ‍לֹא־בַבֶּטֶן עֹשֵׂנִי עָשָׂהוּ וַיְכֻנֶנּוּ בָּרֶחֶם אֶחָד׃
englishText: Did not He that made me in the womb make him? And did not One fashion us in the womb?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־אֶמְנַע מֵחֵפֶץ דַּלִּים וְעֵינֵי אַלְמָנָה אֲכַלֶּה׃
englishText: If I have withheld aught that the poor desired, Or have caused the eyes of the widow to fail;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֹכַל פִּתִּי לְבַדִּי וְלֹא־אָכַל יָתוֹם מִמֶּנָּה׃
englishText: Or have eaten my morsel myself alone, And the fatherless hath not eaten thereof—
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי מִנְּעוּרַי גְּדֵלַנִי כְאָב וּמִבֶּטֶן אִמִּי אַנְחֶנָּה׃
englishText: Nay, from my youth he grew up with me as with a father, And I have been her guide from my mother’s womb.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־אֶרְאֶה אוֹבֵד מִבְּלִי לְבוּשׁ וְאֵין כְּסוּת לָאֶבְיוֹן׃
englishText: If I have seen any wanderer in want of clothing, Or that the needy had no covering;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־לֹא בֵרֲכוּנִי חלצו [חֲלָצָיו] וּמִגֵּז כְּבָשַׂי יִתְחַמָּם׃
englishText: If his loins have not blessed me, And if he were not warmed with the fleece of my sheep;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־הֲנִיפוֹתִי עַל־יָתוֹם יָדִי כִּי־אֶרְאֶה בַשַּׁעַר עֶזְרָתִי׃
englishText: If I have lifted up my hand against the fatherless, Because I saw my help in the gate;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כְּתֵפִי מִשִּׁכְמָה תִפּוֹל וְאֶזְרֹעִי מִקָּנָה תִשָּׁבֵר׃
englishText: Then let my shoulder fall from the shoulder-blade, And mine arm be broken from the bone.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי פַחַד אֵלַי אֵיד אֵל וּמִשְּׂאֵתוֹ לֹא אוּכָל׃
englishText: For calamity from God was a terror to me, And by reason of His majesty I could do nothing.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־שַׂמְתִּי זָהָב כִּסְלִי וְלַכֶּתֶם אָמַרְתִּי מִבְטַחִי׃
englishText: If I have made gold my hope, And have said to the fine gold: ‘Thou art my confidence’;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־אֶשְׂמַח כִּי־רַב חֵילִי וְכִי־כַבִּיר מָצְאָה יָדִי׃
englishText: If I rejoiced because my wealth was great, And because my hand had gotten much;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־אֶרְאֶה אוֹר כִּי יָהֵל וְיָרֵחַ יָקָר הֹלֵךְ׃
englishText: If I beheld the sun when it shined, Or the moon walking in brightness;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּפְתְּ בַּסֵּתֶר לִבִּי וַתִּשַּׁק יָדִי לְפִי׃
englishText: And my heart hath been secretly enticed, And my mouth hath kissed my hand;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גַּם־הוּא עָוֺן פְּלִילִי כִּי־כִחַשְׁתִּי לָאֵל מִמָּעַל׃
englishText: This also were an iniquity to be punished by the judges; For I should have lied to God that is above.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־אֶשְׂמַח בְּפִיד מְשַׂנְאִי וְהִתְעֹרַרְתִּי כִּי־מְצָאוֹ רָע׃
englishText: If I rejoiced at the destruction of him that hated me, Or exulted when evil found him—
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְלֹא־נָתַתִּי לַחֲטֹא חִכִּי לִשְׁאֹל בְּאָלָה נַפְשׁוֹ׃
englishText: Yea, I suffered not my mouth to sin By asking his life with a curse.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־לֹא אָמְרוּ מְתֵי אָהֳלִי מִי־יִתֵּן מִבְּשָׂרוֹ לֹא נִשְׂבָּע׃
englishText: If the men of my tent said not: ‘Who can find one that hath not been satisfied with his meat?’ .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בַּחוּץ לֹא־יָלִין גֵּר דְּלָתַי לָאֹרַח אֶפְתָּח׃
englishText: The stranger did not lodge in the street; My doors I opened to the roadside.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־כִּסִּיתִי כְאָדָם פְּשָׁעָי לִטְמוֹן בְּחֻבִּי עֲוֺנִי׃
englishText: If after the manner of men I covered my transgressions, By hiding mine iniquity in my bosom—
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי אֶעֱרוֹץ הָמוֹן רַבָּה וּבוּז־מִשְׁפָּחוֹת יְחִתֵּנִי וָאֶדֹּם לֹא־אֵצֵא פָתַח׃
englishText: Because I feared the great multitude, And the most contemptible among families terrified me, So that I kept silence, and went not out of the door.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִי יִתֶּן־לִי שֹׁמֵעַ לִי הֶן־תָּוִי שַׁדַּי יַעֲנֵנִי וְסֵפֶר כָּתַב אִישׁ רִיבִי׃
englishText: Oh that I had one to hear me!— Lo, here is my signature, let the Almighty answer me— And that I had the indictment which mine adversary hath written!
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־לֹא עַל־שִׁכְמִי אֶשָּׂאֶנּוּ אֶעֶנְדֶנּוּ עֲטָרוֹת לִי׃
englishText: Surely I would carry it upon my shoulder; I would bind it unto me as a crown.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִסְפַּר צְעָדַי אַגִּידֶנּוּ כְּמוֹ־נָגִיד אֲקָרֲבֶנּוּ׃
englishText: I would declare unto him the number of my steps; As a prince would I go near unto him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־עָלַי אַדְמָתִי תִזְעָק וְיַחַד תְּלָמֶיהָ יִבְכָּיוּן׃
englishText: If my land cry out against me, And the furrows thereof weep together;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־כֹּחָהּ אָכַלְתִּי בְלִי־כָסֶף וְנֶפֶשׁ בְּעָלֶיהָ הִפָּחְתִּי׃
englishText: If I have eaten the fruits thereof without money, Or have caused the tillers thereof to be disappointed—
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תַּחַת חִטָּה יֵצֵא חוֹחַ וְתַחַת־שְׂעֹרָה בָאְשָׁה תַּמּוּ דִּבְרֵי אִיּוֹב׃
englishText: Let thistles grow instead of wheat, And noisome weeds instead of barley. The words of Job are ended.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּשְׁבְּתוּ שְׁלֹשֶׁת הָאֲנָשִׁים הָאֵלֶּה מֵעֲנוֹת אֶת־אִיּוֹב כִּי הוּא צַדִּיק בְּעֵינָיו׃
englishText: So these three men ceased to answer Job, because he was righteous in his own eyes.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּחַר אַף אֱלִיהוּא בֶן־בַּרַכְאֵל הַבּוּזִי מִמִּשְׁפַּחַת רָם בְּאִיּוֹב חָרָה אַפּוֹ עַל־צַדְּקוֹ נַפְשׁוֹ מֵאֱלֹהִים׃
englishText: Then was kindled the wrath of Elihu the son of Barachel the Buzite, of the family of Ram; against Job was his wrath kindled, because he justified himself rather than God.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבִשְׁלֹשֶׁת רֵעָיו חָרָה אַפּוֹ עַל אֲשֶׁר לֹא־מָצְאוּ מַעֲנֶה וַיַּרְשִׁיעוּ אֶת־אִיּוֹב׃
englishText: Also against his three friends was his wrath kindled, because they had found no answer, and yet had condemned Job.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וֶאֱלִיהוּ חִכָּה אֶת־אִיּוֹב בִּדְבָרִים כִּי זְקֵנִים־הֵמָּה מִמֶּנּוּ לְיָמִים׃
englishText: Now Elihu had waited to speak unto Job, because they were older than he.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּרְא אֱלִיהוּא כִּי אֵין מַעֲנֶה בְּפִי שְׁלֹשֶׁת הָאֲנָשִׁים וַיִּחַר אַפּוֹ׃
englishText: And when Elihu saw that there was no answer in the mouth of these three men, his wrath was kindled.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּעַן אֱלִיהוּא בֶן־בַּרַכְאֵל הַבּוּזִי וַיֹּאמַר צָעִיר אֲנִי לְיָמִים וְאַתֶּם יְשִׁישִׁים עַל־כֵּן זָחַלְתִּי וָאִירָא מֵחַוֺּת דֵּעִי אֶתְכֶם׃
englishText: And Elihu the son of Barachel the Buzite answered and said: I am young, and ye are very old; Wherefore I held back, and durst not declare you mine opinion.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָמַרְתִּי יָמִים יְדַבֵּרוּ וְרֹב שָׁנִים יֹדִיעוּ חָכְמָה׃
englishText: I said: ‘Days should speak, And multitude of years should teach wisdom.’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָכֵן רוּחַ־הִיא בֶאֱנוֹשׁ וְנִשְׁמַת שַׁדַּי תְּבִינֵם׃
englishText: But it is a spirit in man, And the breath of the Almighty, that giveth them understanding.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־רַבִּים יֶחְכָּמוּ וּזְקֵנִים יָבִינוּ מִשְׁפָּט׃
englishText: It is not the great that are wise, Nor the aged that discern judgment.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לָכֵן אָמַרְתִּי שִׁמְעָה־לִּי אֲחַוֶּה דֵּעִי אַף־אָנִי׃
englishText: Therefore I say: ‘Hearken to me; I also will declare mine opinion.’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֵן הוֹחַלְתִּי לְדִבְרֵיכֶם אָזִין עַד־תְּבוּנֹתֵיכֶם עַד־תַּחְקְרוּן מִלִּין׃
englishText: Behold, I waited for your words, I listened for your reasons, Whilst ye searched out what to say.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְעָדֵיכֶם אֶתְבּוֹנָן וְהִנֵּה אֵין לְאִיּוֹב מוֹכִיחַ עוֹנֶה אֲמָרָיו מִכֶּם׃
englishText: Yea, I attended unto you, And, behold, there was none that convinced Job, Or that answered his words, among you.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פֶּן־תֹּאמְרוּ מָצָאנוּ חָכְמָה אֵל יִדְּפֶנּוּ לֹא־אִישׁ׃
englishText: Beware lest ye say: ‘We have found wisdom; God may vanquish him, not man! ’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְלֹא־עָרַךְ אֵלַי מִלִּין וּבְאִמְרֵיכֶם לֹא אֲשִׁיבֶנּוּ׃
englishText: For he hath not directed his words against me; Neither will I answer him with your speeches.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חַתּוּ לֹא־עָנוּ עוֹד הֶעְתִּיקוּ מֵהֶם מִלִּים׃
englishText: They are amazed, they answer no more; Words are departed from them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְהוֹחַלְתִּי כִּי־לֹא יְדַבֵּרוּ כִּי עָמְדוּ לֹא־עָנוּ עוֹד׃
englishText: And shall I wait, because they speak not, Because they stand still, and answer no more?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַעֲנֶה אַף־אֲנִי חֶלְקִי אֲחַוֶּה דֵעִי אַף־אָנִי׃
englishText: I also will answer my part, I also will declare mine opinion.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי מָלֵתִי מִלִּים הֱצִיקַתְנִי רוּחַ בִּטְנִי׃
englishText: For I am full of words; The spirit within me constraineth me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הִנֵּה־בִטְנִי כְּיַיִן לֹא־יִפָּתֵחַ כְּאֹבוֹת חֲדָשִׁים יִבָּקֵעַ׃
englishText: Behold, mine inwards are as wine which hath no vent; Like new wine-skins which are ready to burst.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲדַבְּרָה וְיִרְוַח־לִי אֶפְתַּח שְׂפָתַי וְאֶעֱנֶה׃
englishText: I will speak, that I may find relief; I will open my lips and answer.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־נָא אֶשָּׂא פְנֵי־אִישׁ וְאֶל־אָדָם לֹא אֲכַנֶּה׃
englishText: Let me not, I pray you, respect any man’s person; Neither will I give flattering titles unto any man.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי לֹא יָדַעְתִּי אֲכַנֶּה כִּמְעַט יִשָּׂאֵנִי עֹשֵׂנִי׃
englishText: For I know not to give flattering titles; Else would my Maker soon take me away
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאוּלָם שְׁמַע־נָא אִיּוֹב מִלָּי וְכָל־דְּבָרַי הַאֲזִינָה׃
englishText: Howbeit, Job, I pray thee, hear my speech, And hearken to all my words.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הִנֵּה־נָא פָּתַחְתִּי פִי דִּבְּרָה לְשׁוֹנִי בְחִכִּי׃
englishText: Behold now, I have opened my mouth, My tongue hath spoken in my mouth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יֹשֶׁר־לִבִּי אֲמָרָי וְדַעַת שְׂפָתַי בָּרוּר מִלֵּלוּ׃
englishText: My words shall utter the uprightness of my heart; And that which my lips know they shall speak sincerely.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רוּחַ־אֵל עָשָׂתְנִי וְנִשְׁמַת שַׁדַּי תְּחַיֵּנִי׃
englishText: The spirit of God hath made me, And the breath of the Almighty given me life.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־תּוּכַל הֲשִׁיבֵנִי עֶרְכָה לְפָנַי הִתְיַצָּבָה׃
englishText: If thou canst, answer thou me, Set thy words in order before me, stand forth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֵן־אֲנִי כְפִיךָ לָאֵל מֵחֹמֶר קֹרַצְתִּי גַם־אָנִי׃
englishText: Behold, I am toward God even as thou art; I also am formed out of the clay.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הִנֵּה אֵמָתִי לֹא תְבַעֲתֶךָּ וְאַכְפִּי עָלֶיךָ לֹא־יִכְבָּד׃
englishText: Behold, my terror shall not make thee afraid, Neither shall my pressure be heavy upon thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַךְ אָמַרְתָּ בְאָזְנָי וְקוֹל מִלִּין אֶשְׁמָע׃
englishText: Surely thou hast spoken in my hearing, And I have heard the voice of thy words;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זַךְ אֲנִי בְּלִי פָשַׁע חַף אָנֹכִי וְלֹא עָוֺן לִי׃
englishText: ’I am clean, without transgression, I am innocent, neither is there iniquity in me;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֵן תְּנוּאוֹת עָלַי יִמְצָא יַחְשְׁבֵנִי לְאוֹיֵב לוֹ׃
englishText: Behold, He findeth occasions against me, He counteth me for His enemy;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָשֵׂם בַּסַּד רַגְלָי יִשְׁמֹר כָּל־אָרְחֹתָי׃
englishText: He putteth my feet in the stocks, He marketh all my paths.’ .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֶן־זֹאת לֹא־צָדַקְתָּ אֶעֱנֶךָּ כִּי־יִרְבֶּה אֱלוֹהַ מֵאֱנוֹשׁ׃
englishText: Behold, I answer thee: In this thou art not right, That God is too great for man;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַדּוּעַ אֵלָיו רִיבוֹתָ כִּי כָל־דְּבָרָיו לֹא־יַעֲנֶה׃
englishText: Why hast thou striven against Him? Seeing that He will not answer any of his words.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־בְאַחַת יְדַבֶּר־אֵל וּבִשְׁתַּיִם לֹא יְשׁוּרֶנָּה׃
englishText: For God speaketh in one way, Yea in two, though man perceiveth it not.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בַּחֲלוֹם חֶזְיוֹן לַיְלָה בִּנְפֹל תַּרְדֵּמָה עַל־אֲנָשִׁים בִּתְנוּמוֹת עֲלֵי מִשְׁכָּב׃
englishText: In a dream, in a vision of the night, When deep sleep falleth upon men, In slumberings upon the bed;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָז יִגְלֶה אֹזֶן אֲנָשִׁים וּבְמֹסָרָם יַחְתֹּם׃
englishText: Then He openeth the ears of men, And by their chastisement sealeth the decree,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְהָסִיר אָדָם מַעֲשֶׂה וְגֵוָה מִגֶּבֶר יְכַסֶּה׃
englishText: That men may put away their purpose, And that He may hide pride from man;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יַחְשֹׂךְ נַפְשׁוֹ מִנִּי־שָׁחַת וְחַיָּתוֹ מֵעֲבֹר בַּשָּׁלַח׃
englishText: That He may keep back his soul from the pit, And his life from perishing by the sword.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְהוּכַח בְּמַכְאוֹב עַל־מִשְׁכָּבוֹ וריב [וְרוֹב] עֲצָמָיו אֵתָן׃
englishText: He is chastened also with pain upon his bed, And all his bones grow stiff;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְזִהֲמַתּוּ חַיָּתוֹ לָחֶם וְנַפְשׁוֹ מַאֲכַל תַּאֲוָה׃
englishText: So that his life maketh him to abhor bread, And his soul dainty food.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִכֶל בְּשָׂרוֹ מֵרֹאִי ושפי [וְשֻׁפּוּ] עַצְמוֹתָיו לֹא רֻאּוּ׃
englishText: His flesh is consumed away, that it cannot be seen; And his bones corrode to unsightliness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַתִּקְרַב לַשַּׁחַת נַפְשׁוֹ וְחַיָּתוֹ לַמְמִתִים׃
englishText: Yea, his soul draweth near unto the pit, And his life to the destroyers.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־יֵשׁ עָלָיו מַלְאָךְ מֵלִיץ אֶחָד מִנִּי־אָלֶף לְהַגִּיד לְאָדָם יָשְׁרוֹ׃
englishText: If there be for him an angel, An intercessor, one among a thousand, To vouch for a man’s uprightness;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיְחֻנֶּנּוּ וַיֹּאמֶר פְּדָעֵהוּ מֵרֶדֶת שָׁחַת מָצָאתִי כֹפֶר׃
englishText: Then He is gracious unto him, and saith: ‘Deliver him from going down to the pit, I have found a ransom.’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רֻטֲפַשׁ בְּשָׂרוֹ מִנֹּעַר יָשׁוּב לִימֵי עֲלוּמָיו׃
englishText: His flesh is tenderer than a child’s; He returneth to the days of his youth;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יֶעְתַּר אֶל־אֱלוֹהַּ וַיִּרְצֵהוּ וַיַּרְא פָּנָיו בִּתְרוּעָה וַיָּשֶׁב לֶאֱנוֹשׁ צִדְקָתוֹ׃
englishText: He prayeth unto God, and He is favourable unto him; So that he seeth His face with joy; And He restoreth unto man his righteousness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָשֹׁר עַל־אֲנָשִׁים וַיֹּאמֶר חָטָאתִי וְיָשָׁר הֶעֱוֵיתִי וְלֹא־שָׁוָה לִי׃
englishText: He cometh before men, and saith: ‘I have sinned, and perverted that which was right, And it profited me not.’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פָּדָה נפשי [נַפְשׁוֹ] מֵעֲבֹר בַּשָּׁחַת וחיתי [וְחַיָּתוֹ] בָּאוֹר תִּרְאֶה׃
englishText: So He redeemeth his soul from going into the pit, And his life beholdeth the light.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֶן־כָּל־אֵלֶּה יִפְעַל־אֵל פַּעֲמַיִם שָׁלוֹשׁ עִם־גָּבֶר׃
englishText: Lo, all these things doth God work, Twice, yea thrice, with a man,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְהָשִׁיב נַפְשׁוֹ מִנִּי־שָׁחַת לֵאוֹר בְּאוֹר הַחַיִּים׃
englishText: To bring back his soul from the pit, That he may be enlightened with the light of the living.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַקְשֵׁב אִיּוֹב שְׁמַע־לִי הַחֲרֵשׁ וְאָנֹכִי אֲדַבֵּר׃
englishText: Mark well, O Job, hearken unto me; Hold thy peace, and I will speak.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־יֵשׁ־מִלִּין הֲשִׁיבֵנִי דַּבֵּר כִּי־חָפַצְתִּי צַדְּקֶךָּ׃
englishText: If thou hast any thing to say, answer me; Speak, for I desire to justify thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־אַיִן אַתָּה שְׁמַע־לִי הַחֲרֵשׁ וַאֲאַלֶּפְךָ חָכְמָה׃
englishText: If not, hearken thou unto me; Hold thy peace, and I will teach thee wisdom.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּעַן אֱלִיהוּא וַיֹּאמַר׃
englishText: Moreover Elihu answered and said:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׁמְעוּ חֲכָמִים מִלָּי וְיֹדְעִים הַאֲזִינוּ לִי׃
englishText: Hear my words, ye wise men; And give ear unto me, ye that have knowledge.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־אֹזֶן מִלִּין תִּבְחָן וְחֵךְ יִטְעַם לֶאֱכֹל׃
englishText: For the ear trieth words, As the palate tasteth food.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִשְׁפָּט נִבְחֲרָה־לָּנוּ נֵדְעָה בֵינֵינוּ מַה־טּוֹב׃
englishText: Let us choose for us that which is right; Let us know among ourselves what is good.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־אָמַר אִיּוֹב צָדַקְתִּי וְאֵל הֵסִיר מִשְׁפָּטִי׃
englishText: For Job hath said: ‘I am righteous, And God hath taken away my right;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַל־מִשְׁפָּטִי אֲכַזֵּב אָנוּשׁ חִצִּי בְלִי־פָשַׁע׃
englishText: Notwithstanding my right I am accounted a liar; My wound is incurable, though I am without transgression.’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִי־גֶבֶר כְּאִיּוֹב יִשְׁתֶּה־לַּעַג כַּמָּיִם׃
englishText: What man is like Job, Who drinketh up scorning like water?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאָרַח לְחֶבְרָה עִם־פֹּעֲלֵי אָוֶן וְלָלֶכֶת עִם־אַנְשֵׁי־רֶשַׁע׃
englishText: Who goeth in company with the workers of iniquity, And walketh with wicked men.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־אָמַר לֹא יִסְכָּן־גָּבֶר בִּרְצֹתוֹ עִם־אֱלֹהִים׃
englishText: For he hath said: ‘It profiteth a man nothing That he should be in accord with God.’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לָכֵן אַנֲשֵׁי לֵבָב שִׁמְעוּ לִי חָלִלָה לָאֵל מֵרֶשַׁע וְשַׁדַּי מֵעָוֶל׃
englishText: Therefore hearken unto me, ye men of understanding: Far be it from God, that He should do wickedness; And from the Almighty, that He should commit iniquity.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי פֹעַל אָדָם יְשַׁלֶּם־לוֹ וּכְאֹרַח אִישׁ יַמְצִאֶנּוּ׃
englishText: For the work of a man will He requite unto him, And cause every man to find according to his ways.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַף־אָמְנָם אֵל לֹא־יַרְשִׁיעַ וְשַׁדַּי לֹא־יְעַוֵּת מִשְׁפָּט׃
englishText: Yea, of a surety, God will not do wickedly, Neither will the Almighty pervert justice.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִי־פָקַד עָלָיו אָרְצָה וּמִי שָׂם תֵּבֵל כֻּלָּהּ׃
englishText: Who gave Him a charge over the earth? Or who hath disposed the whole world?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־יָשִׂים אֵלָיו לִבּוֹ רוּחוֹ וְנִשְׁמָתוֹ אֵלָיו יֶאֱסֹף׃
englishText: If He set His heart upon man, If He gather unto Himself his spirit and his breath;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִגְוַע כָּל־בָּשָׂר יָחַד וְאָדָם עַל־עָפָר יָשׁוּב׃
englishText: All flesh shall perish together, And man shall return unto dust.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאִם־בִּינָה שִׁמְעָה־זֹּאת הַאֲזִינָה לְקוֹל מִלָּי׃
englishText: If now thou hast understanding, hear this; Hearken to the voice of my words.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַאַף שׂוֹנֵא מִשְׁפָּט יַחֲבוֹשׁ וְאִם־צַדִּיק כַּבִּיר תַּרְשִׁיעַ׃
englishText: Shall even one that hateth right govern? And wilt thou condemn Him that is just and mighty—
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַאֲמֹר לְמֶלֶךְ בְּלִיָּעַל רָשָׁע אֶל־נְדִיבִים׃
englishText: Is it fit to say to a king: ‘Thou art base’? Or to nobles: ‘Ye are wicked’?—
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲשֶׁר לֹא־נָשָׂא פְּנֵי שָׂרִים וְלֹא נִכַּר־שׁוֹעַ לִפְנֵי־דָל כִּי־מַעֲשֵׂה יָדָיו כֻּלָּם׃
englishText: That respecteth not the persons of princes, Nor regardeth the rich more than the poor? For they all are the work of His hands.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רֶגַע יָמֻתוּ וַחֲצוֹת לָיְלָה יְגֹעֲשׁוּ עָם וְיַעֲבֹרוּ וְיָסִירוּ אַבִּיר לֹא בְיָד׃
englishText: In a moment they die, even at midnight; The people are shaken and pass away, And the mighty are taken away without hand. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־עֵינָיו עַל־דַּרְכֵי־אִישׁ וְכָל־צְעָדָיו יִרְאֶה׃
englishText: For His eyes are upon the ways of a man, And He seeth all his goings.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֵין־חֹשֶׁךְ וְאֵין צַלְמָוֶת לְהִסָּתֶר שָׁם פֹּעֲלֵי אָוֶן׃
englishText: There is no darkness, nor shadow of death, Where the workers of iniquity may hide themselves.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי לֹא עַל־אִישׁ יָשִׂים עוֹד לַהֲלֹךְ אֶל־אֵל בַּמִּשְׁפָּט׃
englishText: For He doth not appoint a time unto any man, When he should go before God in judgment.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָרֹעַ כַּבִּירִים לֹא־חֵקֶר וַיַּעֲמֵד אֲחֵרִים תַּחְתָּם׃
englishText: He breaketh in pieces mighty men without inquisition, And setteth others in their stead.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לָכֵן יַכִּיר מַעְבָּדֵיהֶם וְהָפַךְ לַיְלָה וְיִדַּכָּאוּ׃
englishText: Therefore He taketh knowledge of their works; And He overturneth them in the night, so that they are crushed.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תַּחַת־רְשָׁעִים סְפָקָם בִּמְקוֹם רֹאִים׃
englishText: He striketh them as wicked men In the open sight of others;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲשֶׁר עַל־כֵּן סָרוּ מֵאַחֲרָיו וְכָל־דְּרָכָיו לֹא הִשְׂכִּילוּ׃
englishText: Because they turned aside from following Him, And would not have regard to any of His ways;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְהָבִיא עָלָיו צַעֲקַת־דָּל וְצַעֲקַת עֲנִיִּים יִשְׁמָע׃
englishText: So that they cause the cry of the poor to come unto Him, And He heareth the cry of the afflicted.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְהוּא יַשְׁקִט וּמִי יַרְשִׁעַ וְיַסְתֵּר פָּנִים וּמִי יְשׁוּרֶנּוּ וְעַל־גּוֹי וְעַל־אָדָם יָחַד׃
englishText: When He giveth quietness, who then can condemn? And when He hideth His face, who then can behold Him? Whether it be done unto a nation, or unto a man, alike;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִמְּלֹךְ אָדָם חָנֵף מִמֹּקְשֵׁי עָם׃
englishText: That the godless man reign not, That there be none to ensnare the people.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־אֶל־אֵל הֶאָמַר נָשָׂאתִי לֹא אֶחְבֹּל׃
englishText: For hath any said unto God: ‘I have borne chastisement, though I offend not;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בִּלְעֲדֵי אֶחֱזֶה אַתָּה הֹרֵנִי אִם־עָוֶל פָּעַלְתִּי לֹא אֹסִיף׃
englishText: That which I see not teach Thou me; If I have done iniquity, I will do it no more’?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַמֵעִמְּךָ יְשַׁלְמֶנָּה כִּי־מָאַסְתָּ כִּי־אַתָּה תִבְחַר וְלֹא־אָנִי וּמַה־יָדַעְתָּ דַבֵּר׃
englishText: Shall His recompense be as thou wilt? For thou loathest it, So that thou must choose, and not I; Therefore speak what thou knowest.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַנְשֵׁי לֵבָב יֹאמְרוּ לִי וְגֶבֶר חָכָם שֹׁמֵעַ לִי׃
englishText: Men of understanding will say unto me, Yea, every wise man that heareth me:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִיּוֹב לֹא־בְדַעַת יְדַבֵּר וּדְבָרָיו לֹא בְהַשְׂכֵּיל׃
englishText: ’Job speaketh without knowledge, And his words are without discernment.’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָבִי יִבָּחֵן אִיּוֹב עַד־נֶצַח עַל־תְּשֻׁבֹת בְּאַנְשֵׁי־אָוֶן׃
englishText: Would that Job were tried unto the end, Because of his answering like wicked men.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי יֹסִיף עַל־חַטָּאתוֹ פֶשַׁע בֵּינֵינוּ יִסְפּוֹק וְיֶרֶב אֲמָרָיו לָאֵל׃
englishText: For he addeth rebellion unto his sin, He clappeth his hands among us, And multiplieth his words against God.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּעַן אֱלִיהוּ וַיֹּאמַר׃
englishText: Moreover Elihu answered and said:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲזֹאת חָשַׁבְתָּ לְמִשְׁפָּט אָמַרְתָּ צִדְקִי מֵאֵל׃
englishText: Thinkest thou this to be thy right, Or sayest thou: ‘I am righteousness before God’,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־תֹאמַר מַה־יִּסְכָּן־לָךְ מָה־אֹעִיל מֵחַטָּאתִי׃
englishText: That thou inquirest: ‘What advantage will it be unto Thee?’ And: ‘What profit shall I have, more than if I had sinned?’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲנִי אֲשִׁיבְךָ מִלִּין וְאֶת־רֵעֶיךָ עִמָּךְ׃
englishText: I will give thee answer, And thy companions with thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַבֵּט שָׁמַיִם וּרְאֵה וְשׁוּר שְׁחָקִים גָּבְהוּ מִמֶּךָּ׃
englishText: Look unto the heavens, and see; And behold the skies, which are higher than thou.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־חָטָאתָ מַה־תִּפְעָל־בּוֹ וְרַבּוּ פְשָׁעֶיךָ מַה־תַּעֲשֶׂה־לּוֹ׃
englishText: If thou hast sinned, what doest thou against Him? And if thy transgressions be multiplied, what doest thou unto Him?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־צָדַקְתָּ מַה־תִּתֶּן־לוֹ אוֹ מַה־מִיָּדְךָ יִקָּח׃
englishText: If thou be righteous, what givest thou Him? Or what receiveth He of thy hand?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְאִישׁ־כָּמוֹךָ רִשְׁעֶךָ וּלְבֶן־אָדָם צִדְקָתֶךָ׃
englishText: Thy wickedness concerneth a man as thou art; And thy righteousness a son of man.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מֵרֹב עֲשׁוּקִים יַזְעִיקוּ יְשַׁוְּעוּ מִזְּרוֹעַ רַבִּים׃
englishText: By reason of the multitude of oppressions they cry out; They cry for help by reason of the arm of the mighty.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְלֹא־אָמַר אַיֵּה אֱלוֹהַּ עֹשָׂי נֹתֵן זְמִרוֹת בַּלָּיְלָה׃
englishText: But none saith: ‘Where is God my Maker, Who giveth songs in the night;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַלְּפֵנוּ מִבַּהֲמוֹת אָרֶץ וּמֵעוֹף הַשָּׁמַיִם יְחַכְּמֵנוּ׃
englishText: Who teacheth us more than the beasts of the earth, And maketh us wiser than the fowls of heaven?’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׁם יִצְעֲקוּ וְלֹא יַעֲנֶה מִפְּנֵי גְּאוֹן רָעִים׃
englishText: There they cry, but none giveth answer, Because of the pride of evil men.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַךְ־שָׁוְא לֹא־יִשְׁמַע אֵל וְשַׁדַּי לֹא יְשׁוּרֶנָּה׃
englishText: Surely God will not hear vanity, Neither will the Almighty regard it.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַף כִּי־תֹאמַר לֹא תְשׁוּרֶנּוּ דִּין לְפָנָיו וּתְחוֹלֵל לוֹ׃
englishText: Yea, when thou sayest thou canst not see Him— The cause is before Him; therefore wait thou for Him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְעַתָּה כִּי־אַיִן פָּקַד אַפּוֹ וְלֹא־יָדַע בַּפַּשׁ מְאֹד׃
englishText: And now, is it for nought that He punished in His anger? And hath He not full knowledge of arrogance?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאִיּוֹב הֶבֶל יִפְצֶה־פִּיהוּ בִּבְלִי־דַעַת מִלִּין יַכְבִּר׃
englishText: But Job doth open his mouth in vanity; He multiplieth words without knowledge.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיֹּסֶף אֱלִיהוּא וַיֹּאמַר׃
englishText: Elihu also proceeded, and said:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כַּתַּר־לִי זְעֵיר וַאֲחַוֶּךָּ כִּי עוֹד לֶאֱלוֹהַּ מִלִּים׃
englishText: Suffer me a little, and I will tell thee; For there are yet words on God’s behalf.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֶשָּׂא דֵעִי לְמֵרָחוֹק וּלְפֹעֲלִי אֶתֵּן־צֶדֶק׃
englishText: I will fetch my knowledge from afar, And will ascribe righteousness to my Maker.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־אָמְנָם לֹא־שֶׁקֶר מִלָּי תְּמִים דֵּעוֹת עִמָּךְ׃
englishText: For truly my words are not false; One that is upright in mind is with thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֶן־אֵל כַּבִּיר וְלֹא יִמְאָס כַּבִּיר כֹּחַ לֵב׃
englishText: Behold, God is mighty, yet He despiseth not any; He is mighty in strength of understanding.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־יְחַיֶּה רָשָׁע וּמִשְׁפַּט עֲנִיִּים יִתֵּן׃
englishText: He preserveth not the life of the wicked; But giveth to the poor their right.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־יִגְרַע מִצַּדִּיק עֵינָיו וְאֶת־מְלָכִים לַכִּסֵּא וַיֹּשִׁיבֵם לָנֶצַח וַיִּגְבָּהוּ׃
englishText: He withdraweth not His eyes from the righteous; But with kings upon the throne He setteth them for ever, and they are exalted.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאִם־אֲסוּרִים בַּזִּקִּים יִלָּכְדוּן בְּחַבְלֵי־עֹנִי׃
englishText: And if they be bound in fetters, And be holden in cords of affliction;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּגֵּד לָהֶם פָּעֳלָם וּפִשְׁעֵיהֶם כִּי יִתְגַּבָּרוּ׃
englishText: Then He declareth unto them their work, And their transgressions, that they have behaved themselves proudly.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּגֶל אָזְנָם לַמּוּסָר וַיֹּאמֶר כִּי־יְשֻׁבוּן מֵאָוֶן׃
englishText: He openeth also their ear to discipline, And commandeth that they return from iniquity.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־יִשְׁמְעוּ וְיַעֲבֹדוּ יְכַלּוּ יְמֵיהֶם בַּטּוֹב וּשְׁנֵיהֶם בַּנְּעִימִים׃
englishText: If they hearken and serve Him, They shall spend their days in prosperity, And their years in pleasures.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאִם־לֹא יִשְׁמְעוּ בְּשֶׁלַח יַעֲבֹרוּ וְיִגְוְעוּ כִּבְלִי־דָעַת׃
englishText: But if they hearken not, they shall perish by the sword, And they shall die without knowledge.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְחַנְפֵי־לֵב יָשִׂימוּ אָף לֹא יְשַׁוְּעוּ כִּי אֲסָרָם׃
englishText: But they that are godless in heart lay up anger; They cry not for help when He bindeth them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תָּמֹת בַּנֹּעַר נַפְשָׁם וְחַיָּתָם בַּקְּדֵשִׁים׃
englishText: Their soul perisheth in youth, And their life as that of the depraved.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְחַלֵּץ עָנִי בְעָנְיוֹ וְיִגֶל בַּלַּחַץ אָזְנָם׃
englishText: He delivereth the afflicted by His affliction, And openeth their ear by tribulation.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאַף הֲסִיתְךָ מִפִּי־צָר רַחַב לֹא־מוּצָק תַּחְתֶּיהָ וְנַחַת שֻׁלְחָנְךָ מָלֵא דָשֶׁן׃
englishText: Yea, He hath allured thee out of distress Into a broad place, where there is no straitness; And that which is set on thy table is full of fatness;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְדִין־רָשָׁע מָלֵאתָ דִּין וּמִשְׁפָּט יִתְמֹכוּ׃
englishText: And thou art full of the judgment of the wicked; Judgment and justice take hold on them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־חֵמָה פֶּן־יְסִיתְךָ בְסָפֶק וְרָב־כֹּפֶר אַל־יַטֶּךָּ׃
englishText: For beware of wrath, lest thou be led away by thy sufficiency; Neither let the greatness of the ransom turn thee aside.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲיַעֲרֹךְ שׁוּעֲךָ לֹא בְצָר וְכֹל מַאֲמַצֵּי־כֹחַ׃
englishText: Will thy riches avail, that are without stint, Or all the forces of thy strength?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תִּשְׁאַף הַלָּיְלָה לַעֲלוֹת עַמִּים תַּחְתָּם׃
englishText: Desire not the night, When peoples are cut off in their place.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הִשָּׁמֶר אַל־תֵּפֶן אֶל־אָוֶן כִּי־עַל־זֶה בָּחַרְתָּ מֵעֹנִי׃
englishText: Take heed, regard not iniquity; For this hast thou chosen rather than affliction.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֶן־אֵל יַשְׂגִּיב בְּכֹחוֹ מִי כָמֹהוּ מוֹרֶה׃
englishText: Behold, God doeth loftily in His power; Who is a teacher like Him?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִי־פָקַד עָלָיו דַּרְכּוֹ וּמִי־אָמַר פָּעַלְתָּ עַוְלָה׃
englishText: Who hath enjoined Him His way? Or who hath said: ‘Thou hast wrought unrighteousness’?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זְכֹר כִּי־תַשְׂגִּיא פָעֳלוֹ אֲשֶׁר שֹׁרְרוּ אֲנָשִׁים׃
englishText: Remember that thou magnify His work, Whereof men have sung.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כָּל־אָדָם חָזוּ־בוֹ אֱנוֹשׁ יַבִּיט מֵרָחוֹק׃
englishText: All men have looked thereon; Man beholdeth it afar off.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֶן־אֵל שַׂגִּיא וְלֹא נֵדָע מִסְפַּר שָׁנָיו וְלֹא־חֵקֶר׃
englishText: Behold, God is great, beyond our knowledge; The number of His years is unsearchable.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי יְגָרַע נִטְפֵי־מָיִם יָזֹקּוּ מָטָר לְאֵדוֹ׃
englishText: For He draweth away the drops of water, Which distil rain from His vapour;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲשֶׁר־יִזְּלוּ שְׁחָקִים יִרְעֲפוּ עֲלֵי אָדָם רָב׃
englishText: Which the skies pour down And drop upon the multitudes of men.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַף אִם־יָבִין מִפְרְשֵׂי־עָב תְּשֻׁאוֹת סֻכָּתוֹ׃
englishText: Yea, can any understand the spreadings of the clouds, The crashings of His pavilion?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֵן־פָּרַשׂ עָלָיו אוֹרוֹ וְשָׁרְשֵׁי הַיָּם כִּסָּה׃
englishText: Behold, He spreadeth His light upon it; And He covereth the depths of the sea.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־בָם יָדִין עַמִּים יִתֶּן־אֹכֶל לְמַכְבִּיר׃
englishText: For by these He judgeth the peoples; He giveth food in abundance.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַל־כַּפַּיִם כִּסָּה־אוֹר וַיְצַו עָלֶיהָ בְמַפְגִּיעַ׃
englishText: He covereth His hands with the lightning, And giveth it a charge that it strike the mark.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יַגִּיד עָלָיו רֵעוֹ מִקְנֶה אַף עַל־עוֹלֶה׃
englishText: The noise thereof telleth concerning it, The cattle also concerning the storm that cometh up.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַף־לְזֹאת יֶחֱרַד לִבִּי וְיִתַּר מִמְּקוֹמוֹ׃
englishText: At this also my heart trembleth, And is moved out of its place.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׁמְעוּ שָׁמוֹעַ בְּרֹגֶז קֹלוֹ וְהֶגֶה מִפִּיו יֵצֵא׃
englishText: Hear attentively the noise of His voice, And the sound that goeth out of His mouth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תַּחַת־כָּל־הַשָּׁמַיִם יִשְׁרֵהוּ וְאוֹרוֹ עַל־כַּנְפוֹת הָאָרֶץ׃
englishText: He sendeth it forth under the whole heaven, And His lightning unto the ends of the earth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַחֲרָיו יִשְׁאַג־קוֹל יַרְעֵם בְּקוֹל גְּאוֹנוֹ וְלֹא יְעַקְּבֵם כִּי־יִשָּׁמַע קוֹלוֹ׃
englishText: After it a voice roareth; He thundereth with the voice of His majesty; And He stayeth them not when His voice is heard.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יַרְעֵם אֵל בְּקוֹלוֹ נִפְלָאוֹת עֹשֶׂה גְדֹלוֹת וְלֹא נֵדָע׃
englishText: God thundereth marvellously with His voice; Great things doeth He, which we cannot comprehend.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי לַשֶּׁלַג יֹאמַר הֱוֵא אָרֶץ וְגֶשֶׁם מָטָר וְגֶשֶׁם מִטְרוֹת עֻזּוֹ׃
englishText: For He saith to the snow: ‘Fall thou on the earth’; Likewise to the shower of rain, and to the showers of His mighty rain.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּיַד־כָּל־אָדָם יַחְתּוֹם לָדַעַת כָּל־אַנְשֵׁי מַעֲשֵׂהוּ׃
englishText: He sealeth up the hand of every man, That all men whom He hath made may know it.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַתָּבֹא חַיָּה בְמוֹ־אָרֶב וּבִמְעוֹנֹתֶיהָ תִשְׁכֹּן׃
englishText: Then the beasts go into coverts, And remain in their dens.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִן־הַחֶדֶר תָּבוֹא סוּפָה וּמִמְּזָרִים קָרָה׃
englishText: Out of the Chamber cometh the storm; And cold out of the north.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִנִּשְׁמַת־אֵל יִתֶּן־קָרַח וְרֹחַב מַיִם בְּמוּצָק׃
englishText: By the breath of God ice is given, And the breadth of the waters is straitened.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַף־בְּרִי יַטְרִיחַ עָב יָפִיץ עֲנַן אוֹרוֹ׃
englishText: Yea, He ladeth the thick cloud with moister, He spreadeth abroad the cloud of His lightning;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְהוּא מְסִבּוֹת מִתְהַפֵּךְ בתחבולתו [בְּתַחְבּוּלֹתָיו] לְפָעֳלָם כֹּל אֲשֶׁר יְצַוֵּם עַל־פְּנֵי תֵבֵל אָרְצָה׃
englishText: And they are turned round about by His guidance, That they may do whatsoever He commandeth them Upon the face of the habitable world:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־לְשֵׁבֶט אִם־לְאַרְצוֹ אִם־לְחֶסֶד יַמְצִאֵהוּ׃
englishText: Whether it be for correction, or for His earth, Or for mercy, that He cause it to come.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַאֲזִינָה זֹּאת אִיּוֹב עֲמֹד וְהִתְבּוֹנֵן נִפְלְאוֹת אֵל׃
englishText: Hearken unto this, O Job; Stand still, and consider the wondrous works of God.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲתֵדַע בְּשׂוּם־אֱלוֹהַּ עֲלֵיהֶם וְהוֹפִיעַ אוֹר עֲנָנוֹ׃
englishText: Dost thou know how God enjoineth them, And causeth the lightning of His cloud to shine?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲתֵדַע עַל־מִפְלְשֵׂי־עָב מִפְלְאוֹת תְּמִים דֵּעִים׃
englishText: Dost thou know the balancings of the clouds, The wondrous works of Him who is perfect in knowledge?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲשֶׁר־בְּגָדֶיךָ חַמִּים בְּהַשְׁקִט אֶרֶץ מִדָּרוֹם׃
englishText: Thou whose garments are warm, When the earth is still by reason of the south wind;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תַּרְקִיעַ עִמּוֹ לִשְׁחָקִים חֲזָקִים כִּרְאִי מוּצָק׃
englishText: Canst thou with Him spread out the sky, Which is strong as a molten mirror?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הוֹדִיעֵנוּ מַה־נֹּאמַר לוֹ לֹא־נַעֲרֹךְ מִפְּנֵי־חֹשֶׁךְ׃
englishText: Teach us what we shall say unto Him; For we cannot order our speech by reason of darkness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַיְסֻפַּר־לוֹ כִּי אֲדַבֵּר אִם־אָמַר אִישׁ כִּי יְבֻלָּע׃
englishText: Shall it be told Him that I would speak? Or should a man wish that he were swallowed up?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְעַתָּה לֹא רָאוּ אוֹר בָּהִיר הוּא בַּשְּׁחָקִים וְרוּחַ עָבְרָה וַתְּטַהֲרֵם׃
englishText: And now men see not the light which is bright in the skies; But the wind passeth, and cleanseth them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִצָּפוֹן זָהָב יֶאֱתֶה עַל־אֱלוֹהַּ נוֹרָא הוֹד׃
englishText: Out of the north cometh golden splendour, About God is terrible majesty.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שַׁדַּי לֹא־מְצָאנֻהוּ שַׂגִּיא־כֹחַ וּמִשְׁפָּט וְרֹב־צְדָקָה לֹא יְעַנֶּה׃
englishText: The Almighty, whom we cannot find out, is excellent in power, Yet to judgment and plenteous justice He doeth no violence.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לָכֵן יְרֵאוּהוּ אֲנָשִׁים לֹא־יִרְאֶה כָּל־חַכְמֵי־לֵב׃
englishText: Men do therefore fear Him; He regardeth not any that are wise of heart.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּעַן־יְהוָה אֶת־אִיּוֹב מנ הסערה [מִן ] [הַסְּעָרָה] וַיֹּאמַר׃
englishText: Then the LORD answered Job out of the whirlwind, and said:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִי זֶה מַחְשִׁיךְ עֵצָה בְמִלִּין בְּלִי־דָעַת׃
englishText: Who is this that darkeneth counsel By words without knowledge?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱזָר־נָא כְגֶבֶר חֲלָצֶיךָ וְאֶשְׁאָלְךָ וְהוֹדִיעֵנִי׃
englishText: Gird up now thy loins like a man; For I will demand of thee, and declare thou unto Me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֵיפֹה הָיִיתָ בְּיָסְדִי־אָרֶץ הַגֵּד אִם־יָדַעְתָּ בִינָה׃
englishText: Where wast thou when I laid the foundations of the earth? Declare, if thou hast the understanding.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִי־שָׂם מְמַדֶּיהָ כִּי תֵדָע אוֹ מִי־נָטָה עָלֶיהָ קָּו׃
englishText: Who determined the measures thereof, if thou knowest? Or who stretched the line upon it?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַל־מָה אֲדָנֶיהָ הָטְבָּעוּ אוֹ מִי־יָרָה אֶבֶן פִּנָּתָהּ׃
englishText: Whereupon were the foundations thereof fastened? Or who laid the corner-stone thereof,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּרָן־יַחַד כּוֹכְבֵי בֹקֶר וַיָּרִיעוּ כָּל־בְּנֵי אֱלֹהִים׃
englishText: When the morning stars sang together, And all the sons of God shouted for joy?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיָּסֶךְ בִּדְלָתַיִם יָם בְּגִיחוֹ מֵרֶחֶם יֵצֵא׃
englishText: Or who shut up the sea with doors, When it broke forth, and issued out of the womb;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּשׂוּמִי עָנָן לְבֻשׁוֹ וַעֲרָפֶל חֲתֻלָּתוֹ׃
englishText: When I made the cloud the garment thereof, And thick darkness a swaddlingband for it,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וָאֶשְׁבֹּר עָלָיו חֻקִּי וָאָשִׂים בְּרִיחַ וּדְלָתָיִם׃
englishText: And prescribed for it My decree, And set bars and doors,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וָאֹמַר עַד־פֹּה תָבוֹא וְלֹא תֹסִיף וּפֹא־יָשִׁית בִּגְאוֹן גַּלֶּיךָ׃
englishText: And said: ‘Thus far shalt thou come, but no further; And here shall thy proud waves be stayed’?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הְמִיָּמֶיךָ צִוִּיתָ בֹּקֶר ידעתה שחר [יִדַּעְתָּה] [הַשַּׁחַר] מְקֹמוֹ׃
englishText: Hast thou commanded the morning since thy days began, And caused the dayspring to know its place;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֶאֱחֹז בְּכַנְפוֹת הָאָרֶץ וְיִנָּעֲרוּ רְשָׁעִים מִמֶּנָּה׃
englishText: That it might take hold of the ends of the earth, And the wicked be shaken out of it?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תִּתְהַפֵּךְ כְּחֹמֶר חוֹתָם וְיִתְיַצְּבוּ כְּמוֹ לְבוּשׁ׃
englishText: It is changed as clay under the seal; And they stand as a garment.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְיִמָּנַע מֵרְשָׁעִים אוֹרָם וּזְרוֹעַ רָמָה תִּשָּׁבֵר׃
englishText: But from the wicked their light is withholden, And the high arm is broken.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲבָאתָ עַד־נִבְכֵי־יָם וּבְחֵקֶר תְּהוֹם הִתְהַלָּכְתָּ׃
englishText: Hast thou entered into the springs of the sea? Or hast thou walked in the recesses of the deep? .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲנִגְלוּ לְךָ שַׁעֲרֵי־מָוֶת וְשַׁעֲרֵי צַלְמָוֶת תִּרְאֶה׃
englishText: Have the gates of death been revealed unto thee? Or hast thou seen the gates of the shadow of death?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הִתְבֹּנַנְתָּ עַד־רַחֲבֵי־אָרֶץ הַגֵּד אִם־יָדַעְתָּ כֻלָּהּ׃
englishText: Hast thou surveyed unto the breadths of the earth? Declare, if thou knowest it all.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֵי־זֶה הַדֶּרֶךְ יִשְׁכָּן־אוֹר וְחֹשֶׁךְ אֵי־זֶה מְקֹמוֹ׃
englishText: Where is the way to the dwelling of light, And as for darkness, where is the place thereof;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי תִקָּחֶנּוּ אֶל־גְּבוּלוֹ וְכִי־תָבִין נְתִיבוֹת בֵּיתוֹ׃
englishText: That thou shouldest take it to the bound thereof, And that thou shouldest know the paths to the house thereof?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָדַעְתָּ כִּי־אָז תִּוָּלֵד וּמִסְפַּר יָמֶיךָ רַבִּים׃
englishText: Thou knowest it, for thou wast then born, And the number of thy days is great!
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲבָאתָ אֶל־אֹצְרוֹת שָׁלֶג וְאֹצְרוֹת בָּרָד תִּרְאֶה׃
englishText: Hast thou entered the treasuries of the snow, Or hast thou seen the treasuries of the hail,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲשֶׁר־חָשַׂכְתִּי לְעֶת־צָר לְיוֹם קְרָב וּמִלְחָמָה׃
englishText: Which I have reserved against the time of trouble, Against the day of battle and war?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֵי־זֶה הַדֶּרֶךְ יֵחָלֶק אוֹר יָפֵץ קָדִים עֲלֵי־אָרֶץ׃
englishText: By what way is the light parted, Or the east wind scattered upon the earth?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִי־פִלַּג לַשֶּׁטֶף תְּעָלָה וְדֶרֶךְ לַחֲזִיז קֹלוֹת׃
englishText: Who hath cleft a channel for the waterflood, Or a way for the lightning of the thunder;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְהַמְטִיר עַל־אֶרֶץ לֹא־אִישׁ מִדְבָּר לֹא־אָדָם בּוֹ׃
englishText: To cause it to rain on a land where no man is, On the wilderness, wherein there is no man;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְהַשְׂבִּיעַ שֹׁאָה וּמְשֹׁאָה וּלְהַצְמִיחַ מֹצָא דֶשֶׁא׃
englishText: To satisfy the desolate and waste ground, And to cause the bud of the tender herb to spring forth?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲיֵשׁ־לַמָּטָר אָב אוֹ מִי־הוֹלִיד אֶגְלֵי־טָל׃
englishText: Hath the rain a father? Or who hath begotten the drops of dew?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִבֶּטֶן מִי יָצָא הַקָּרַח וּכְפֹר שָׁמַיִם מִי יְלָדוֹ׃
englishText: Out of whose womb came the ice? And the hoar-frost of heaven, who hath gendered it?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כָּאֶבֶן מַיִם יִתְחַבָּאוּ וּפְנֵי תְהוֹם יִתְלַכָּדוּ׃
englishText: The waters are congealed like stone, And the face of the deep is frozen.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַתְקַשֵּׁר מַעֲדַנּוֹת כִּימָה אוֹ־מֹשְׁכוֹת כְּסִיל תְּפַתֵּחַ׃
englishText: Canst thou bind the chains of the Pleiades, Or loose the bands of Orion?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲתֹצִיא מַזָּרוֹת בְּעִתּוֹ וְעַיִשׁ עַל־בָּנֶיהָ תַנְחֵם׃
englishText: Canst thou lead forth the Mazzaroth in their season? Or canst thou guide the Bear with her sons?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲיָדַעְתָּ חֻקּוֹת שָׁמָיִם אִם־תָּשִׂים מִשְׁטָרוֹ בָאָרֶץ׃
englishText: Knowest thou the ordinances of the heavens? Canst thou establish the dominion thereof in the earth?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲתָרִים לָעָב קוֹלֶךָ וְשִׁפְעַת־מַיִם תְּכַסֶּךָּ׃
englishText: Canst thou lift up thy voice to the clouds, That abundance of waters may cover thee?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַתְשַׁלַּח בְּרָקִים וְיֵלֵכוּ וְיֹאמְרוּ לְךָ הִנֵּנוּ׃
englishText: Canst thou send forth lightnings, that they may go, And say unto thee: ‘Here we are’?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִי־שָׁת בַּטֻּחוֹת חָכְמָה אוֹ מִי־נָתַן לַשֶּׂכְוִי בִינָה׃
englishText: Who hath put wisdom in the inward parts? Or who hath given understanding to the mind?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִי־יְסַפֵּר שְׁחָקִים בְּחָכְמָה וְנִבְלֵי שָׁמַיִם מִי יַשְׁכִּיב׃
englishText: Who can number the clouds by wisdom? Or who can pour out the bottles of heaven,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּצֶקֶת עָפָר לַמּוּצָק וּרְגָבִים יְדֻבָּקוּ׃
englishText: When the dust runneth into a mass, And the clods cleave fast together?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲתָצוּד לְלָבִיא טָרֶף וְחַיַּת כְּפִירִים תְּמַלֵּא׃
englishText: Wilt thou hunt the prey for the lioness? Or satisfy the appetite of the young lions,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־יָשֹׁחוּ בַמְּעוֹנוֹת יֵשְׁבוּ בַסֻּכָּה לְמוֹ־אָרֶב׃
englishText: When they couch in their dens, And abide in the covert to lie in wait?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִי יָכִין לָעֹרֵב צֵידוֹ כִּי־ילדו [יְלָדָיו] אֶל־אֵל יְשַׁוֵּעוּ יִתְעוּ לִבְלִי־אֹכֶל׃
englishText: Who provideth for the raven his prey, When his young ones cry unto God, and wander for lack of food?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲיָדַעְתָּ עֵת לֶדֶת יַעֲלֵי־סָלַע חֹלֵל אַיָּלוֹת תִּשְׁמֹר׃
englishText: Knowest thou the time when the wild goats of the rock bring forth? Or canst thou mark when the hinds do calve?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תִּסְפֹּר יְרָחִים תְּמַלֶּאנָה וְיָדַעְתָּ עֵת לִדְתָּנָה׃
englishText: Canst thou number the months that they fulfil? Or knowest thou the time when they bring forth?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תִּכְרַעְנָה יַלְדֵיהֶן תְּפַלַּחְנָה חֶבְלֵיהֶם תְּשַׁלַּחְנָה׃
englishText: They bow themselves, they bring forth their young, They cast out their fruit.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יַחְלְמוּ בְנֵיהֶם יִרְבּוּ בַבָּר יָצְאוּ וְלֹא־שָׁבוּ לָמוֹ׃
englishText: Their young ones wax strong, they grow up in the open field; They go forth, and return not again.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִי־שִׁלַּח פֶּרֶא חָפְשִׁי וּמֹסְרוֹת עָרוֹד מִי פִתֵּחַ׃
englishText: Who hath sent out the wild ass free? Or who hath loosed the bands of the wild ass?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲשֶׁר־שַׂמְתִּי עֲרָבָה בֵיתוֹ וּמִשְׁכְּנוֹתָיו מְלֵחָה׃
englishText: Whose house I have made the wilderness, And the salt land his dwelling-place.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִשְׂחַק לַהֲמוֹן קִרְיָה תְּשֻׁאוֹת נוֹגֵשׂ לֹא יִשְׁמָע׃
englishText: He scorneth the tumult of the city, Neither heareth he the shoutings of the driver.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְתוּר הָרִים מִרְעֵהוּ וְאַחַר כָּל־יָרוֹק יִדְרוֹשׁ׃
englishText: The range of the mountains is his pasture, And he searcheth after every green thing.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲיֹאבֶה רֵּים עָבְדֶךָ אִם־יָלִין עַל־אֲבוּסֶךָ׃
englishText: Will the wild-ox be willing to serve thee? Or will he abide by thy crib?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲ‍תִקְשָׁר־רֵים בְּתֶלֶם עֲבֹתוֹ אִם־יְשַׂדֵּד עֲמָקִים אַחֲרֶיךָ׃
englishText: Canst thou bind the wild-ox with his band in the furrow? Or will he harrow the valleys after thee?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲתִבְטַח־בּוֹ כִּי־רַב כֹּחוֹ וְתַעֲזֹב אֵלָיו יְגִיעֶךָ׃
englishText: Wilt thou trust him, because his strength is great? Or wilt thou leave thy labour to him?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲתַאֲמִין בּוֹ כִּי־ישוב [יָשִׁיב] זַרְעֶךָ וְגָרְנְךָ יֶאֱסֹף׃
englishText: Wilt thou rely on him, that he will bring home thy seed, And gather the corn of thy threshing-floor?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כְּנַף־רְנָנִים נֶעֱלָסָה אִם־אֶבְרָה חֲסִידָה וְנֹצָה׃
englishText: The wing of the ostrich beateth joyously; But are her pinions and feathers the kindly stork’s?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־תַעֲזֹב לָאָרֶץ בֵּצֶיהָ וְעַל־עָפָר תְּחַמֵּם׃
englishText: For she leaveth her eggs on the earth, And warmeth them in dust,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַתִּשְׁכַּח כִּי־רֶגֶל תְּזוּרֶהָ וְחַיַּת הַשָּׂדֶה תְּדוּשֶׁהָ׃
englishText: And forgetteth that the foot may crush them, Or that the wild beast may trample them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הִקְשִׁיחַ בָּנֶיהָ לְּלֹא־לָהּ לְרִיק יְגִיעָהּ בְּלִי־פָחַד׃
englishText: She is hardened against her young ones, as if they were not hers; Though her labour be in vain, she is without fear; .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־הִשָּׁהּ אֱלוֹהַּ חָכְמָה וְלֹא־חָלַק לָהּ בַּבִּינָה׃
englishText: Because God hath deprived her of wisdom, Neither hath He imparted to her understanding.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)
